name: Kim Maier
subject: I wanted to check in.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
I just wanted to make sure you saw my last email because it's crucial we don't fall short of our end-of-year goal. I'm going to be meeting with Stephanie soon and I'd really like to give her some good |
---
Hi Team -- I just wanted to make sure you saw my last email because it's crucial we don't fall short of our end-of-year goal. I'm going to be meeting with Stephanie soon and I'd really like to give her some good news. **We 've made some progress since this morning -- we raised an additional $613 today. But that means we still have $1,261 to go before tomorrow night at midnight.** [**Can you spare a few dollars right now to help us close our online fundraising gap?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191230_em_fr_nd_eoq4_l1) Thank you, \-- Kim | **[CONTRIBUTE](secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191230_em_fr_nd_eoq4_btn1)**
---

\---------- Forwarded Message ----------
Date: Monday, December 30
Re: Stephanie can win
From: Kim Maier

| | Team, you might remember me. I'm Kim, Stephanie's Campaign Manager. I managed this same race in 2018 and we came closer to beating Chris Smith than any other candidate has in decades. And that's why I came back to finish this job -- to send Chris Smith packing and help get Stephanie elected. **But I need to ask you to step up and make your first donation of the campaign.** We're up against arguably the most important fundraising deadline of this campaign -- and we are $1,874 away from hitting our goal. **[Can you chip in?](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0e0/522d4087/7affb979/4f3413fd/1827376270/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191230_em_fr_nd_eoq4_l1")** Stephanie is rejecting corporate PAC dollars and instead is relying on a real grassroots supporter base. I know she's doing the work it will take to win next November. But that means we need to support her now, friends. **[Can you make a quick donation before tomorrow at midnight?](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0e0/522d4087/7affb979/4f3413fc/1827376270/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191230_em_fr_nd_eoq4_l2")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[CONTRIBUTE $10 NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0e0/522d4087/7affb979/4f3413fb/1827376270/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=20191230_em_fr_nd_eoq4_abx_10")**
---

---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50 NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0e0/522d4087/7affb979/4f3413f9/1827376270/VEsD/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20191230_em_fr_nd_eoq4_abx_50")**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100 NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0e0/522d4087/7affb979/4f3413f8/1827376270/VEsA/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20191230_em_fr_nd_eoq4_abx_100")**

**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0e0/522d4087/7affb979/4f3413f7/1827376270/VEsB/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191230_em_fr_nd_eoq4_abx_other")**

Thank you for all you do,
Kim Maier
Campaign Manager
|

---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/founding-donor-nj-04?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey
P.O. Box 217
Little Silver, NJ 07739
_Emails like this help us stay in touch with you over the course of the campaign. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. You may click here to[unsubscribe](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0e0/522d4087/7affb979/4f3413f6/1827376270/VEsO/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://stephanie.bsd.net/unsubscribe") at any time._

Peter --

I'll make this quick. We can't afford another six years of Senator Cornyn. Our election is less than a year away, which means it's more important than ever to stay on track to meet every goal we set.

**Our end-of-quarter deadline is TOMORROW and we 're still $28,003 short of our goal.** MJ needs your help to win this primary, so that we can enter the general election in the strongest position to defeat Senator Cornyn. **[Until tomorrow at midnight, every dollar you donate is being MATCHED -- can MJ count on you to chip in now?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890637/7f51f7bc/4a3446e3/4ef03c0c/2912120846/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjY5OCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191230.3nd__698__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Senator Cornyn has a nearly $11 million war chest thanks to help from his corporate PAC allies -- it's no surprise after he's spent nearly 20 years selling Texans out to special interests like Big Pharma and the gun lobby. So if we're going to build a campaign as big as Texas that's capable of taking him on and _winning_ , we have to stay on track and meet this goal!

**We may be behind now, but the good news is there 's still time to turn things around. Will you rush a matched donation to help us reach our $75,000 end-of-quarter goal and defeat Senator Cornyn? **

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: TOP 10: President Trump’s biggest accomplishments of 2019!
body:
It’s tough to pick just 10 things from such an extraordinary year. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=65ef0ce479&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • December 30, 2019
---
| | |
# TOP 10: President Trump’s biggest accomplishments of 2019!

**Americans saw plenty** of Washington at its worst this year, with one party in Congress obsessed with a partisan impeachment stunt and obstructing progress at every turn. But despite getting no help from the far left, America today is soaring to new heights.

**It’s tough to pick** only 10 accomplishments from such an extraordinary year, but here are just a few of the biggest things President Donald J. Trump has gotten done for the American people in 2019:
1. **The Trump Boom** is going strong. The unemployment rate recently hit its lowest mark in _50 years_. All told, since President Trump’s election, our economy has added more than 7 million jobs—over half a million in manufacturing alone.
2. **The stock market** keeps breaking records: The Dow Jones and S&P 500 hit record closes again on Friday.
3. **The working class** is thriving, as are previously forgotten communities. Wages are [now rising the fastest](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a699d74843&e=3ee4985eea) for low-income workers, and poverty rates for African Americans and Hispanic Americans have reached all-time lows.
4. **Accountable government** is back. Since taking office, President Trump has rolled back nearly 8 regulations for every new one, saving American taxpayers more than $50 billion in the process—with bigger savings still to come.
5. **Better trade deals** are putting America back in the driver’s seat. Congress approved President Trump’s [USMCA](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2a8711667b&e=3ee4985eea) this month—a huge win for U.S. workers, farmers, and manufacturers that will create 176,000 new jobs.
6. **Trade with China** in particular is about to get a whole lot fairer. As part of a historic “phase 1” deal, Beijing has agreed to structural reforms in its trade practices and to make substantial purchases of American agricultural products.
7. **[Securing the border](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af6b45079e&e=3ee4985eea) **is paying off and making our country safer. President Trump struck new agreements with Mexico and Central American countries this year to help stop the flood of illegal immigration. Thanks to this swift action, border apprehensions fell by more than 70 percent from May to November.
8. **On health care** , President Trump is fighting to give our patients the best system on Earth. While Democrats try to take away choice, the President’s focus on affordability led to the largest year-over-year drop in drug prices _ever_ recorded.
9. **American interests** are [taking center stage abroad](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c94950c93d&e=3ee4985eea). In just one example: After years of not paying their fair share, NATO Allies will have increased defense spending by _$130 billion_ by the end of next year.
10. **Our great military** took out the world's top terrorist in October. ([Meet Conan,](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=631c1f4830&e=3ee4985eea) the hero dog who helped them do it!) Our troops are now getting the support they deserve. President Trump recently signed the National Defense Authorization Act for the 2020 fiscal year, which includes the biggest pay raise for our military in a decade.

**On behalf of President Trump** and his entire Administration, have a blessed and wonderful New Year!

[WATCH: “Our best days are yet to come!”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a7e8b3f3d6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=2d32503f43&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cf7677b168&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=27f83c9c46)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

name: Erik
subject: Hey, can I bug you real quick?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| I want to give you an update before the last day of the year. Right now, we are **$11,492** away from our critical end-of-year goal.

[**Remember, we have to make our FEC fundraising report public tomorrow. That means anti-science Republicans will be scouring our numbers looking for any signs of weakness.**](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=10+-+Remember+we+have+to+make+our+FEC+fundrai&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191230_3_9&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191230_3_9&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191230_3_9")

This end-of-year deadline is about protecting our planet from the climate crisis and electing people up and down the ballot who recognize the importance of science.

That means electing John Hickenlooper in Colorado, Mark Kelly in Arizona, Barbara Bollier in Kansas, and Dr. Al Gross in Alaska. And, of course, beating Mitch McConnell in his home state of Kentucky and defeating his Senate Majority.

**[The wind is at our back, and we need to show science-denying Republicans just how much support Democratic scientists have. Are you with us?](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=11+-+The+wind+is+at+our+back+and+we+need+to+s&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191230_3_9&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191230_3_9&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191230_3_9")**

**[Chip in now to help 314 candidates win in 2020:](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=12+-+Chip+in+now+to+help+314+candidates+win+i&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191230_3_9&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191230_3_9&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191230_3_9")**

Thank you for stepping up,

314

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4338/4bd7760e/464b8b2c/77acdc5e/149890839/VEsHAA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=15+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191230_3_9&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191230_3_9")** to make a donation.

name: Mike Franken
subject: bumping Nate's email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
I'm running to be a different kind of senator. I'm going to Washington to reject party politics and fight for what Iowans really need
|
---
| |
---

| | Hello Everyone:

I hope you saw Nate's email yesterday, team. He asked if you could help nudge donations a bit, and you all responded.

**But even though we 're back on course, we still need to raise $6,249 before midnight tomorrow. [Can you send a donation our way?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24c3/33365068/4a618f1f/3f8b9946/1201227578/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191230pm_em_fr_all_eoy4_L1&amount=15")** | [DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24c3/33365068/4a618f1f/3f8b9947/1201227578/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191230pm_em_fr_all_eoy4_btn&amount=15")
---
I'm running to be a different kind of senator. I'm going to Washington to reject party politics and fight for what Iowans really need: quality, affordable health care, fair trade deals, a viable agriculture community, better infrastructure, solutions to the climate crisis, enhanced educational opportunities, a comprehensive immigration plan, and an end to irresponsible leadership -- especially as it relates to taxation policy.

**But without your help, winning this campaign for change will be more than difficult.[Can you chip in right now to help us hit our end-of-year goal?](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24c3/33365068/4a618f1f/3f8b9940/1201227578/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191230pm_em_fr_all_eoy4_L2&amount=15")**

Best wishes for a peaceful 2020,

Mike Franken USN VADM (ret.)
Candidate for U.S. Senate, Iowa

[DONATE >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f24c3/33365068/4a618f1f/3f8b9941/1201227578/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mfq42019?refcode=FRA_20191230pm_em_fr_all_eoy4_ftr&amount=15")
---

---

| Paid for by Franken for Iowa
---

Sioux City, IA 51102

If anybody knows how important keeping our House majority is, it’s Speaker Nancy Pelosi. Together, we’re fighting to improve the lives of all America | | | If anybody knows how important keeping our House majority is, it’s Speaker Nancy Pelosi. Together, we’re fighting to improve the lives of all Americans. But now, that hard work is at risk because partisan extremists and right-wing special interests are gearing up to flip this seat red. We can hold them off by sending in our strongest fundraising report yet. But, there’s no time to waste. There’s only one day left and we still need $3,822. **[I need your help more than ever. If you can chip in even $20, then we can beat this goal in a heartbeat. Let’s show them what Arizonans can achieve when we fight together.](http://links.tomohalleran.com/u/click?_t=63bcf327664141c1a59a283fcc863b63&_m=149c01b65e61442aa616c374ae11a02c&_e=st2qIBkwrycBfGMT5XEp08SfW1aASmiUgBb3DTx5wobi8ckQdCkrVsxz-CSTCqjlG6q-Dc1sESi2J_QZBusUPKfBXBCFYYSJfhzkJIy_-0nsKucTHr9Bj7MxPvEW24y3_TCcHfE9_XOfbRYTt_i_rbvso_d_pertP4z01AWB4sEhmN0kqcLX0GzYeMOiz92SQk7JRDAwI7I1JOCympmwEvHCzqboRkfGyGJAHQynJ4JifDmiC0t5Ov9TEq-QZZYrxXMhtJByqgyMObBikTw2TYpbRlpprJD6N5J5UupYdS2iHNvC4NoBC16dyCgBk8tN23EUyh5WCeTvonZG_L3XMpxfUxZVpd2S6A9U3i0T4QCFacR7aE1h_uXyO-jSIYVMOufX7ZuhH8clH1j4HVwpyVAJPZeR3IG_3AUkV2bghfdeMzoaXfiBPE8oqRTErYSS2mL5FPxWPG-0j0QUP9QoQ6Ep1B2J69OmIVjNE4MHVAA3q73rPOTfciSJxymZD9fl)** Thank you,
Tom O’Halleran

clean_body: If anybody knows how important keeping our House majority is, it’s Speaker Nancy Pelosi. Together, we’re fighting to improve the lives of all America | | | If anybody knows how important keeping our House majority is, it’s Speaker Nancy Pelosi. Together, we’re fighting to improve the lives of all Americans. But now, that hard work is at risk because partisan extremists and right-wing special interests are gearing up to flip this seat red. We can hold them off by sending in our strongest fundraising report yet. But, there’s no time to waste. There’s only one day left and we still need $3,822. Thank you, Tom O’Halleran \-----FORWARDED MESSAGE---- Hi, Nancy Pelosi here and I need your help. Right now, Tom is defending one of the most competitive House seats in the country. In 2016, voters in his district split their tickets and put their trust in Tom -- and in 2020, Republicans think they have a shot to flip this seat. That’s why they’ve already poured thousands of dollars of attack ads into Tom’s district this year alone. If we stand a chance at keeping the Democratic control of the House, we have to help candidates like Tom. If we don’t, we risk losing our House majority. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | ---|---|--- | | The 2020 election is in less than a year and without Tom’s voice in the House, our ability to get our government working for the people again is weakened. That’s why we need your help to get ahead of his goal -- especially since far-right groups are spending massive amounts to flip his district red. We’re grateful for your support, Speaker Nancy Pelosi Tom O'Halleran is a former police officer, business owner and a family man who serves in Congress to bring people together to solve the challenges our communities face every day. Now he's running for re-election to keep Arizona's first district blue in 2020. Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress

It's never been more important that our campaign put up the strongest fundraising numbers possible and secure our position ahead of Iowa.

John's policy platform is simple: we can make REAL PROGRESS like creating universal health care, tackling climate change, and creating good-paying jobs that pay a living wage. But he knows we can accomplish these goals without crippling our economy and our hospitals.

John is committed to telling Americans the truth and fighting for the sweeping change Americans so desperately need. This is why John is about to embark on a month-long, 40 stop tour through Iowa. Because we have to do this together, and we can't do this without you -- we mean it.

**We 're sorry to keep asking, but we must. Can you chip in just $5 right now to John's grassroots campaign?**

name: Michael (personal)
subject: quick request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
| | | Team - I have a quick favor to ask: Will you donate to my campaign before tomorrow's FEC deadline at midnight?

As my team explained earlier, your support right now will make all the difference. We need another $75,OOO before midnight if we're going to compete with the billionaires who are flooding the airwaves.

You can use this secure link to donate now:

[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ab/134673f2/8911b26/6997688e/913409861/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_123019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Michael Bennet

* * *

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ab/134673f2/8911b26/6997688e/913409861/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_123019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
Friend, here's the truth: [We're facing a fundraising shortfall. We need you to make a $5 donation to Michael's presidential campaign, and here's why.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ab/134673f2/8911b26/6997688e/913409861/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_123019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

The final fundraising deadline of 2019 is tomorrow at midnight. While people pop champagne and watch the ball drop, others will be scrutinizing our numbers.

Michael has been an underdog in this race, and so far, we've gotten by on a shoestring budget by being smart and scrappy.

But unless we raise another $75,OOO before New Years Eve, [we cannot compete with the billionaires flooding the airwaves.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ab/134673f2/8911b26/6997688e/913409861/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_123019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Coming from a politically diverse state like Colorado, Michael has never known an easy election. He knew running for president would be no different.

[_But restoring decency to our highest office is worth the fight._](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ab/134673f2/8911b26/6997688e/913409861/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_123019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[Team, any amount you donate today will help us reach this crucial end-of-year goal. Will you make your first donation? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ab/134673f2/8911b26/6997688e/913409861/VEsA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_123019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN $5 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ab/134673f2/8911b26/6997688d/913409861/VEsB/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_123019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ab/134673f2/8911b26/6997688c/913409861/VEsO/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_123019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $29 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ab/134673f2/8911b26/69976883/913409861/VEsP/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_123019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ab/134673f2/8911b26/69976882/913409861/VEsHBQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_123019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ab/134673f2/8911b26/69976881/913409861/VEsHBA/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_123019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Team, we can't let this election just become bickering over empty promises and policies we can't pass.

We have to ignite our base while also winning back the places we lost in 2016. We've got to make sure everyone knows they have a president who's more concerned about their kids' future than the next tweet.

[We've launched ads, opened new office space, and hired more field staff, but we need to raise another $75,OOO before New Years Eve if we're going to keep building at the pace we need to win!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ab/134673f2/8911b26/6997688e/913409861/VEsHBw/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_123019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Since Michael refuses to take contributions from corporate special interests, every step we take in this journey is because grassroots supporters like you are with us, ensuring our campaign has what it takes to win this hard-fought race.

[We're counting on this team to step up and join the fight to help us hit our goal. Together, we know we can do it. Chip in $5 (or whatever you can) right now:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ab/134673f2/8911b26/6997688e/913409861/VEsHBg/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_123019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8ab/134673f2/8911b26/69976883/913409861/VEsHAQ/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B2_123019_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=29&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
---
Thank you,

Bennet for America

subject: a short note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- This is an important moment for our campaign. In just about 24 hours, we'll close the books on our year-end FEC fundraising deadline and begin compiling our official fundraising report. We're still short of reaching our $500,000 online fundraising goal, but we're really close -- close enough that if you chip in just $10 or more right now, your contribution could make the difference. [**Can John Hickenlooper and our campaign count on you to make a donation before our final FEC fundraising deadline expires tomorrow night at midnight? name: Sara Gideon for Senate
subject: Why we've been asking
body:
We've sent a few emails about this FEC fundraising deadline, so we thought it important to explain what makes this deadline so important and then to ask you to chip in to help us hit our goals.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e31/4bef7a87/6a1a7ac9/287f918b/1812406483/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
We've sent a few emails about this FEC fundraising deadline, so we thought it important to explain what makes this deadline so important and then to ask you to chip in to help us hit our goals.
Here it goes:
Tomorrow at midnight, our FEC deadline comes to a close. Shortly after, how much money we've raised AND how many contributions we've received toward that total will be released to the public.
Susan Collins has to do the same.
And while her report will show a lot of big contributions from the wealthy and well-connected, our report will show many more small contributions from regular people looking for a Senator who will represent ALL Mainers, not just the ones who can afford to write big checks.
So that's our job. We have to catch up to Susan Collins' fundraising AND show that we are unquestionably THE grassroots campaign in this race. And that means we have to ask:
[**Can Sara Gideon count on you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign before tomorrow 's FEC fundraising deadline comes to a close? **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e31/4bef7a87/6a1a7ac9/287f918a/1812406483/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzAtNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191230-4-full")
As you know, Sara Gideon doesn't accept corporate PAC money in this race. It wasn't an easy decision to make, but it was the right decision. Thank you for stepping up and helping to fill the gap -- especially before this FEC fundraising deadline.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e31/4bef7a87/6a1a7ac9/287f918a/1812406483/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzAtNC1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191230-4-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e31/4bef7a87/6a1a7ac9/287f9189/1812406483/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e31/4bef7a87/6a1a7ac9/287f9188/1812406483/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e31/4bef7a87/6a1a7ac9/287f918f/1812406483/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**
clean_body: We've sent a few emails about this FEC fundraising deadline, so we thought it important to explain what makes this deadline so important and then to ask you to chip in to help us hit our goals. "" Friends - We've sent a few emails about this FEC fundraising deadline, so we thought it important to explain what makes this deadline so important and then to ask you to chip in to help us hit our goals. Here it goes: Tomorrow at midnight, our FEC deadline comes to a close. Shortly after, how much money we've raised AND how many contributions we've received toward that total will be released to the public. Susan Collins has to do the same. And while her report will show a lot of big contributions from the wealthy and well-connected, our report will show many more small contributions from regular people looking for a Senator who will represent ALL Mainers, not just the ones who can afford to write big checks. So that's our job. We have to catch up to Susan Collins' fundraising AND show that we are unquestionably THE grassroots campaign in this race. And that means we have to ask: "" As you know, Sara Gideon doesn't accept corporate PAC money in this race. It wasn't an easy decision to make, but it was the right decision. Thank you for stepping up and helping to fill the gap -- especially before this FEC fundraising deadline. All my best, Amy Mesner Campaign Manager **** ""** Sara Gideon for Maine PO Box 812 South Freeport, ME 04078

name: Andrew Yang for President
subject: Our response to the DNC:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We’re going to raise $3.5 million.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5371%2E377263%2EygeMkv) Yang Gang --

The DNC _outright rejected_ our request for a fair, representative process to commission more polls between now and the January 10 debate qualification deadline.

While they may unfairly decide who ends up on the debate stage -- ignoring hundreds of thousands of voters and you, who have contributed your hard-earned dollars and unwavering support to this campaign -- they can’t decide what we do in response.

**We are hitting back with a huge message by raising our end-of-quarter goal to $3.5 million.** Raising a record fundraising haul is our best chance at ensuring that we have a strong showing in the few polls that do come out in the coming days.

[Let’s show the DNC and everyone watching that we will not be silenced -- and this government must be by and for the people. Give all you can toward our loud $3.5 million goal now. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20985?t=5&akid=5371%2E377263%2EygeMkv)

Our voices are more important and more representative of this democracy than the establishment’s rules attempting to keep us off the debate stage. And they are underestimating the power of the Yang Gang.

An opportunity to rise up and build a movement that shifts the political climate doesn’t come around often. We have to show our strength and blow this goal out of the water.

[Join the wave that shakes Washington -- let’s make this a historic fundraising quarter, and let’s do everything in our power to get Andrew on that debate stage. Pitch in $10 or more now. ](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20985?t=6&akid=5371%2E377263%2EygeMkv) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20985?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5371%2E377263%2EygeMkv)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20985?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=5371%2E377263%2EygeMkv)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20985?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=5371%2E377263%2EygeMkv)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20985?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=5371%2E377263%2EygeMkv)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20985?t=11&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=5371%2E377263%2EygeMkv)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20985?t=12&amount=25&akid=5371%2E377263%2EygeMkv)
---
The sky's the limit, Yang Gang.

Let’s show them who we are.

Yang2020
**Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that, our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Pitch in now so we can show everyone the power of this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20985?t=13&akid=5371%2E377263%2EygeMkv)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=5371%2E377263%2EygeMkv) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5371%2E377263%2EygeMkv) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

Before we close the books, friend, can I put you down for your first donation? | —Chris Chris Fadeff Chief Operating Officer Tom 2020 \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Hunter, TomSteyer.com Date: Monday, December 30 Subject: Will you help? Hi friend, I’m Hunter, Tom’s campaign treasurer, and I promise I won’t take up much of your time. But I’m here crunching away on the Federal Election Commission (FEC) report that we need to file by December 31, and I noticed that we didn’t have you listed as one of our donors. I’m going to keep the spreadsheet open for a little longer so you can By donating to Tom’s campaign, you’re building the momentum behind Tom and his vision for America, so everyone can see that this grassroots movement is really growing. Will you chip in today? Giving wealthy donors extra access is an easy way to raise funds, but we can't get rid of the corrupting influence of money in politics... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bfe9/45c30650/1eac51696/66fd199e/1769044761/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

Tomorrow is the FEC fundraising deadline day, and we won't lie to you: the pressure is on.

But our campaign won't be holding fancy closed-door fundraisers with special interest groups or calling billionaires to ask them for money. Giving wealthy donors extra access is an easy way to raise funds, but we can't get rid of the corrupting influence of money in politics by doing business as usual.

**We're building a grassroots movement that's stronger than big money.**

But building a movement takes a lot of resources and Elizabeth is counting on grassroots supporters to help close our fundraising gap and hit our $20 million goal.

**[Our average donation so far this quarter is just $26. Can you chip in that amount-- or anything else you can -- to help close the gap?](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/2852bfe9/45c30650/1eac51696/66fd1981/1769044761/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWRlYzE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTTJGRl9FT1FfTEdQX1dfMjAxOTEyMzBfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-dec19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMM2FF_EOQ_LGP_W_20191230_V1S1_P")**

The only way to fight for big, structural change in 2021 -- the only way to beat the corporations, the special interests, and everything that keeps our government working for the wealthy and well-connected -- is to mobilize people in every community.

That's why we're organizing in all 50 states. That's why we operate on the principle of equal access -- whether you chip in $1, $2, or $50, you own an equal piece of this campaign.

**[And that's why we need your help. clean_body: Giving wealthy donors extra access is an easy way to raise funds, but we can't get rid of the corrupting influence of money in politics... | | | "" Tomorrow is the FEC fundraising deadline day, and we won't lie to you: the pressure is on. But our campaign won't be holding fancy closed-door fundraisers with special interest groups or calling billionaires to ask them for money. Giving wealthy donors extra access is an easy way to raise funds, but we can't get rid of the corrupting influence of money in politics by doing business as usual. We're building a grassroots movement that's stronger than big money. But building a movement takes a lot of resources and Elizabeth is counting on grassroots supporters to help close our fundraising gap and hit our $20 million goal. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" The only way to fight for big, structural change in 2021 -- the only way to beat the corporations, the special interests, and everything that keeps our government working for the wealthy and well-connected -- is to mobilize people in every community. That's why we're organizing in all 50 states. That's why we operate on the principle of equal access -- whether you chip in $1, $2, or $50, you own an equal piece of this campaign. "" Thanks for everything you do, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

name: Cory Booker
subject: Picture this: An all-white DNC debate stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, Almost a month ago, I sent you the note below about the December debate. I was concerned then about how the DNC's qualifying thresholds have made it difficult for candidates of color to earn their way onto the stage. Unfortunately, that same concern rings true today. The January debate is a little over two weeks away. And once again, we're facing the prospect of a debate stage that is completely missing the perspectives of diverse communities. We shouldn't have debate rules that, on the one hand, allow self-funding billionaires like Tom Steyer to buy their way onto the stage, while, on the other, excluding qualified candidates of color from the conversation. The odds may be against us, but I'm going to fight as hard as I can to secure my spot on that stage. **If you 're with me, chip in here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191230_CB_20191230-fr-CB-EM3-actives_actives_l1_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Too much is at stake in this election for the challenges facing communities of color not to be given the attention they deserve. I'll leave you with this: _**We are the party of diversity. We are the party of inclusion. Let 's start acting like it.**_ Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191230_CB_20191230-fr-CB-EM3-actives_actives_contribbutton1_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _\---FORWARDED MESSAGE---_ Team, I'll get right to the point: Six candidates currently in the race are qualified for the DNC's December debate. But as it stands now, after starting with the most diverse presidential field in our nation's history, you might not see our party's diversity reflected on that stage. **Not a single one of the candidates who have qualified for the December debate is a person of color. And that 's a shame.** **These thresholds have had the effect of denying candidates of color access to the debate stage while paving the way for billionaires who are inflating their support through massive ad buys.[I'm asking for your donation right now to help me qualify for the December debate by placing ads in the early states.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191230_CB_20191230-fr-CB-EM3-actives_actives_l2_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** This race is still far from decided. No one knows who we will choose as our party's nominee in Milwaukee next July. But it would be unacceptable if our final choices did not reflect the rich diversity of our party. **[We need a debate stage that fully reflects the Democratic Party, not one limited to candidates with massive donor bases and billionaires who are able to buy their way onto the debate stage. Please donate to my campaign to help me qualify for the next debate.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191230_CB_20191230-fr-CB-EM3-actives_actives_l3_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Put me on that debate stage and I'll demonstrate that I can, and I have, united moderate and progressive Democrats. I'll demonstrate that I can, and I have, excited and engaged Black voters, the most loyal constituency of our party. And I'll demonstrate that I am the only person in this race who can rebuild the coalition that elected President Obama that we need in order to defeat Donald Trump. We are the party of diversity. We are the party of inclusion. Let's start acting like it. Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191230_CB_20191230-fr-CB-EM3-actives_actives_contribbutton2_v2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f6e/5fca0d19/7be82def/291cc721/2359172162/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f6e/5fca0d19/7be82def/291cc720/2359172162/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f6e/5fca0d19/7be82def/291cc72f/2359172162/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f6e/5fca0d19/7be82def/291cc72e/2359172162/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f6e/5fca0d19/7be82def/291cc72d/2359172162/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f6e/5fca0d19/7be82def/291cc721/2359172162/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

Hi Friend, Doyle is running in 2020 because she understands that we are running out of time to rescue our planet, and she is all in to fight for our future in this most important decade to come. She has a vision that Oregon can lead the way by harnessing our wind and wave energy, and creating forestry jobs that cool our climate -- jobs that will last for generations to come. **That's why every leading climate organization in the district, and the national group 350 Action, have already endorsed Canning for Congress** \-- and why we're working around the clock right now to raise as many contributions as possible before the filing deadline of 9 PM Oregon time tomorrow.

Doyle has spent the last twenty years building movements to protect the earth and defend human rights. She knows climate science, law, and politics inside out, and she'll bring the fight for our climate front and center in the halls of Congress. We are now 27 hours away from the fundraising deadline for 2019. However much we raise, or fall short, will be seen as a sign of our strength going into 2020. **We need every supporter to send a contribution before 9 PM Oregon time on New Years Eve, so we can send a strong message that we 're playing to win in 2020.** [**Can we count on you to help send a climate champion to Congress?**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/DAE/ni0YAA/t.2y0/63UMd4UgRWCOD3Z-ZKOaOg/h6/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v0WJjSCSRo8CfbRIOmw7Zw21g4sbZhAgS011p-2BbWaw4Rnreifw-2BabIi4kNyApCiqX8pYhiJHGrnby9ygg0pxGhBaR3IrvIrbgWSclA8JHpRCLUcaPa-2BDzpPiZm0gjfXola-2FW5wdg4Tj6yfivYlTyFdrCpKW1VrMZOqNRsEAEwzZnN6bVgrMMkrLKoh5d-2FjVhDsHzrVUHJdhs55zn6YHexIkQ-3D-3D/_fPg) Onward, Team Canning

clean_body: | | Hi Friend, Doyle is running in 2020 because she understands that we are running out of time to rescue our planet, and she is all in to fight for our future in this most important decade to come. She has a vision that Oregon can lead the way by harnessing our wind and wave energy, and creating forestry jobs that cool our climate -- jobs that will last for generations to come. That's why every leading climate organization in the district, and the national group 350 Action, have already endorsed Canning for Congress \-- and why we're working around the clock right now to raise as many contributions as possible before the filing deadline of 9 PM Oregon time tomorrow. | Doyle has spent the last twenty years building movements to protect the earth and defend human rights. She knows climate science, law, and politics inside out, and she'll bring the fight for our climate front and center in the halls of Congress. We are now 27 hours away from the fundraising deadline for 2019. However much we raise, or fall short, will be seen as a sign of our strength going into 2020. We need every supporter to send a contribution before 9 PM Oregon time on New Years Eve, so we can send a strong message that we 're playing to win in 2020. Onward, Team Canning | Doyle Canning is running for Congress in Oregon's 4th Congressional District. Doyle is rejecting all corporate PAC money in this campaign. She relies on grassroots supporters like you! "Donate to Doyle Canning" | | Sent Via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Canning For Congress 2020, please .

name: Pete Buttigieg
subject: Hope for a better future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
I'm standing with Tina Smith before the last deadline of the year and asking you to make a donation to her re-election campaign.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191230-pete?refcode=em191230-pete&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=10") Hi there,

We deserve elected leaders who will keep their word and stand by their convictions to do right by us. These days, leaders like that are few and far between. But Tina Smith has followed through on that promise every single day she has been in the U.S. Senate.

Tina won her special election just last year, and since she took office, Tina has worked to tackle the climate crisis, unleash the potential of rural America, defend reproductive freedom, and so much more. But now, she's up again in 2020, and Donald Trump has set his sights on winning Minnesota. Tina needs our help to keep this seat blue now more than ever.

As we head into the end of the year, Tina is facing her most important FEC fundraising deadline so far. If Democrats are going to take back the Senate, we need to help Tina reach this goal.

**That's why I'm standing with Tina before the last deadline of the year and asking you to make a donation to her re-election campaign. Your contribution today will set the tone heading into 2020 and make a meaningful difference in our work to flip the Senate. Chip in today.** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191230-pete?refcode=em191230-pete&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")
---
| | [$25 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191230-pete?refcode=em191230-pete&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=25")

---
| | [$100 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191230-pete?refcode=em191230-pete&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=100")

---
| | [OTHER »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191230-pete?refcode=em191230-pete&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
This is more than just dollars and cents. It's an act of hope for a better future.

Whether it's health care or climate change or immigration, Democrats have put forward reforms big enough to meet this moment. But to actually deliver on our promise, we need to win back the Senate.

We're at a make-or-break moment, and there's a growing movement of Americans who see it. It's time to turn the page. The Senate majority is within our grasp, but it will take your support to turn it into reality.

**Chip in now to help Tina reach her last FEC fundraising goal of the year and win this election. I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important.**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191230-pete?refcode=em191230-pete&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=10")

---
| [$250 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-em191230-pete?refcode=em191230-pete&recurring=yes&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&express_lane=true&amount=250")

Grassroots donations are the lifeblood of any campaign. Every dollar a supporter like you chips in is an investment in a movement -- one that breaks with the partisanship and gridlock we see in Washington to embrace a better path forward for our country.

It may not be the easy way of doing things, but it's the right way. That's why your donation matters so much today.

Thank you,

Pete Buttigieg

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Our 2019 Victories
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=73A88A1A1019)
---
| | |
---
| | **FRIEND-******************

---
| | As 2020 approaches, I’d like to thank you for your continued support.

Being the opposition in a left wing state is tough and often a lonely battle. But the fight for the future of our city and state is worth fighting for.

Here are some of our victories from 2019. Together, we:

* Restored and expanded funding for veterans mental health programs;

* Got college tuition covered for children of our deceased and disable military men and women;

* Stopped the law that would have registered illegal immigrants to vote;

* Won funding parity for pre-K programs;

* Got Mayor de Blasio to back off his plan to dismantle specialized schools and gifted and talented programs;

* Pushed back against Port Authority and preserved our discounts on the Goethals, Bayonne and Outerbridge.

* Helped hundreds of constituents address and solve problems affecting them and their families.

Our fight to stop misguided policies like the [dangerous new bail law](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=73A88A1A1020) continues.

As a candidate for Congress in next year’s election, 2020 will be my last year in the Assembly. I hope to have a greater platform to be an even stronger voice for the hundreds of thousands of New Yorkers who feel left wing politicians like Bill de Blasio and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez don’t speak for them.

[Get Involved and Donate Today to help me keep fighting.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=73A88A1A1021)
********

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13434153/139454416/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZjEyNjA3ZC1kZTJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=abJVHkBo7Ye8BuiPWOaTx9kj14Q7udWr8M6BPk6k0BY=&emci=0e12607d-de2b-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=0f12607d-de2b-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)
---
Peter, **We had a strong day yesterday and got a lot closer to our goal of hitting $10,000 online in this last week.** Today is the last day of our big end-of-year deadline. This is the last chance to chip in before the final reporting deadline of the election! The strength of our campaign is how we aren’t relying on big dollar donors. We rely on folks like teachers, service workers, retirees, and regular folks who are tired of their absentee representative. We had over 5,000 individual donations this year alone! subject: A year in review
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13434403/139456109/480453248?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.31_b1_rf_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWRmZjVkMy1kZTJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ItcTo2kNCJ94HqQumVH6CJAzt7_Rpk-D6VXZBK3Ovk=) Team,

**What. A. Year.**

We knew that running for Congress in one of the most competitive districts in the country would be exciting, but, as I was reflecting on this last year, I was amazed by everything that has happened so far:
* Nonpartisan election forecasters at publications like _Roll Call_ , _Washington Post_ , and _National Journal_ have all called this race **one of the top ten races in the entire country.**

* _Cook Political Report_ rated PA-10 as a toss up -- **_meaning we have a real chance to flip this seat blue in November._**

* Scott Perry fully embraced the president’s radical agenda, placing the interests of his party boss over that of everyday Pennsylvanians.

* Republican dark money groups have started pouring money into this district, further proving they are scared this district will flip blue.

Looking at all of this, it’s hard to believe that things are going to ramp up even more in the new year -- but this is only the beginning and this campaign is getting more competitive by the second.

[**In order to make sure we have the tools and resources we need to win this seat, we still need to raise $900 by midnight tonight. Can you pitch in $10 or more right now?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13434404/139456110/554177247?refcode=em_fr_2019.12.31_b1_rf_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,500,1000,2800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZWRmZjVkMy1kZTJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8ItcTo2kNCJ94HqQumVH6CJAzt7_Rpk-D6VXZBK3Ovk=)

| | | Peter, I've coached a lot of games over the years. More than I can count. And I know what it takes to WIN.

_Winning takes a solid game plan, and the ability to execute on it!_

That's why I'm writing you one last time before we ring in the New Year.

We've worked hard to develop the game plan it will take to DEFEAT the establishment Republicans and DEFEAT Doug Jones... and we need your help to make it happen!

**_[** Please rush a $5, $10, $25, or $50 donation right now, to help us kick off the New Year ready to TAKE BACK Alabama!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=b9936f819da0e3c7a98d8218df938d461a619f563d997ea66f5d33f59fd2d18f2b0d86b3fff94c6e8137bae68c49a062bbe92b4c19778c9b "** Please rush a $5, $10, $25, or $50 donation right now, to help us kick off the New Year ready to TAKE BACK Alabama!")_**

This is the most important U.S. Senate race on the ballot in 2020. This is our chance to OUST a sitting Democrat, who has opposed President Trump's America First agenda at every turn.

**A new poll shows that only 34 percent of Alabama voters support Jones ' re-election... and also shows our campaign LEADING the Republican field in a head-to-head matchup!**

Enough is enough, Peter. From impeachment to socialism to attacks on our American values, the Democrats have gone off the deep end. They MUST be defeated.

[**_Let 's get the job done_**.](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=b9936f819da0e3c74f74f14a86d66e01d14ec3c53ba781dd250685f9f6883e1144a61c26063c067f3b1d18c3d4913b433d0d668f4f581a5a "Let’s get the job done.")

name: Dean Browning
subject: I need your help.
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Dear Patriot,
We as a country are about to embark on a landmark year in 2020. If Democrats maintain control of the House, they are certain to continue the abuse of power we saw from Speaker Nancy Pelosi and Rep. Adam Schiff in their witch hunt of President Trump. In many ways the fate of our country will be dependent on the outcome of the November 2020 elections. We need a Representative for the PA-7th Congressional District that is not a yes person for Nancy Pelosi's agenda of destruction and chaos

name: Mike Thompson
subject: the ball’s about to drop, and we’re still behind
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress
body:
Sorry to be emailing you on New Years Eve. I won't beat around the bush: we're only a few short hours away from our FINAL fundraising deadline of 2019 -- and we're still short of our goal.

Can I count on you for a small donation to help close the gap?

[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mt-dec19-eoq**](https://act.myngp.com/el/m96_rDP6oRcHr5uCubZvxRXjVVwSlHoE_E2smQbYMqM=/mwx-3tyxm6sL7QzaqxD9o0HXpOWDlRnOX5e4ViXqN00=?refcode=MT_EM_FR_WL_191231_1_4&amount=25&recurring=1)

Thanks for your support.

-- Mike

* * *

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: It’s official -- we can do this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter --

I know you probably have New Year’s plans to look forward to, so I don’t want to keep you long.

I want to say thank you from the bottom of my heart to everyone who’s part of this team. You all helped me so much, whether coming to our town halls, volunteering, spreading the word about this campaign, or donating to our cause.

**[With your help, we’ve built a real movement of Iowans who are ready for change. I know we can bring this all the way to election day next year if we keep going strong. Before the end of the year Peter, can I count on you chip in?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13442528/139515129/1991825711?refcode=em19_191231_eoy4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjEzOWYxMi1mMTJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QXp1KRO2qYA-G13SMeuXn9VyJuDbENcqESB6Wp9JhkM=)** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13442529/139515131/1991825711?refcode=em19_191231_eoy4&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjEzOWYxMi1mMTJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QXp1KRO2qYA-G13SMeuXn9VyJuDbENcqESB6Wp9JhkM=) | [Express Donate $25](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13442531/139515132/1991825711?refcode=em19_191231_eoy4&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjEzOWYxMi1mMTJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QXp1KRO2qYA-G13SMeuXn9VyJuDbENcqESB6Wp9JhkM=)

[Express Donate $250](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13442539/139515140/1991825711?refcode=em19_191231_eoy4&express_lane=true&amount=250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjEzOWYxMi1mMTJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QXp1KRO2qYA-G13SMeuXn9VyJuDbENcqESB6Wp9JhkM=) | [Donate Other Amount](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13442540/139515144/1991825711?refcode=em19_191231_eoy4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjEzOWYxMi1mMTJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QXp1KRO2qYA-G13SMeuXn9VyJuDbENcqESB6Wp9JhkM=)
I really mean it when I say: each and every one of you are the heart and soul of this campaign.

From day one, I have been committed to fighting for all of us in Iowa’s 4th district who are too often forgotten in national politics. We’ve come a long way, but we have a long road ahead of us to beat Steve King.

In 2018, they said Steve King was unbeatable, but we came closer than anyone thought possible. With all of you behind me, we’re at this again, and because of your support, we’re going to beat him in 2020.

To do this, we’ll need to work together. Next year, we’re going to travel to every part of the district, from the cities to the smallest towns who’ve seen no candidate for Congress come through in years.

This year, meeting people face-to-face in rural communities on the Don’t Forget About Us tour has only made me more confident we can do this. We’re building deep and meaningful relationships with voters all over the district. We’re going to keep up the momentum, and 2020 will be our year.

**[I know Iowa is ready for a change in 2020. If you’re tired of feeling neglected and you want to get Steve King out of office, please pitch in whatever you can before our deadline tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13442541/139515145/1991825711?refcode=em19_191231_eoy4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjEzOWYxMi1mMTJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QXp1KRO2qYA-G13SMeuXn9VyJuDbENcqESB6Wp9JhkM=)**

Standing Tall For All,

J.D. Scholten

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13442542/139515147/1991825711?refcode=em19_191231_eoy4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjEzOWYxMi1mMTJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QXp1KRO2qYA-G13SMeuXn9VyJuDbENcqESB6Wp9JhkM=)

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Have questions, concerns, or ideas? Simply reply to this email — we love hearing from supporters! You can also connect with the campaign on social media: Like us on [Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13442544/139515148/-579313244?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjEzOWYxMi1mMTJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QXp1KRO2qYA-G13SMeuXn9VyJuDbENcqESB6Wp9JhkM=&emci=702dcfee-d322-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=f2139f12-f12b-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013) or follow the campaign on [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/13442546/139515150/-1912497674?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTU4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMjEzOWYxMi1mMTJiLWVhMTEtYTYwMS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QXp1KRO2qYA-G13SMeuXn9VyJuDbENcqESB6Wp9JhkM=&emci=702dcfee-d322-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&emdi=f2139f12-f12b-ea11-a601-2818784d6d68&ceid=6658013). name: Gov. Mike Huckabee
subject: Your year-end opportunity expires tonight!
body:
| | [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191231am_apl01nd&n=1) Hi Peter, Did you receive the email about My Faith Votes’ 2020 plan? It’s important because there are over 100,000 elections taking place across the country in 2020, from the federal down to the local level. The voters who turn out at the polls will determine if President Trump serves another term. All 435 seats in the House are up for grabs and 33 Senate seats are at stake. The results of this election will be felt for decades to come. That’s why I’m checking in with you to see if you plan on being part of our plans for 2020. **[You have only today to make your year-end, tax-deductible gift towards our $223,000 goal to mobilize 90-million Christians to the polls in 2020](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191231am_apl01nd&n=2).** Thanks to a generous matching grant, every dollar you give to My Faith Votes BEFORE January 1st will be matched dollar for dollar. _"Woke" Democrat Darren Soto_** __has voted for every destructive, crazy liberal idea this decade!__**

**I'm a combat veteran, and that's why I'm fighting so hard to stop Darren Soto when he votes like the Constitution doesn't exist!**

[I need your help urgently!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=goxTIG6n4l6OuRU&b=RGVW2e3e7npAr6JWwLJV_g) I have a goal of $25,000 raised by December 31. That's what I need to compete against Darren Soto!

But with only hours before the deadline, I'm still $3,750 short of my goal. **[Can you help me?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=goxTIG6n4l6OuRU&b=RGVW2e3e7npAr6JWwLJV_g)**

**I need your help to meet my goal and end the Dems' control of Congress. **Let's send "woke" Nancy Pelosi home in defeat!

_Let's get this done!_

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=goxTIG6n4l6OuRU&b=RGVW2e3e7npAr6JWwLJV_g)

body:

* Do you want to flip the Senate?
* Do you want to see Mitch McConnell lose his seat?
* Do you want Mark Kelly to win?

**Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com

[BECOME A 2019 DONOR HERE >>>](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6ea/53d9897e/53b2f607/1c89cbc9/304283545/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQwOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=__409__&refcode2=statusbar")**

| | Derek,

Mark Warner is coming off a big month in Washington. Here's a look at just a few of Mark's recent legislative victories that are set to become law:
* Pay raise for the military and federal workers
* Record environmental funding for the Chesapeake Bay
* Restoring key funding for Virginia's historically black colleges and universities
* Paid family leave for thousands of federal workers
* Accountability for unsafe military family housing contractors
* Increased election security funding

On these issues and more, Mark is delivering results for Virginians and people across the country, and he needs your help to stay in the Senate. **[Help re-elect Mark](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d6ea/53d9897e/53b2f607/1c89cbc8/304283545/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQwOSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-eoydeadlinend?refcode=20191231_f_1_nd__409__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")** Things are polarized in Washington, but even in a Republican-controlled Senate, and even while working to hold the Trump administration accountable, Mark is still able to get things done. All while taking principled stands on issues like the fight to save healthcare. It's why we need to send Mark back to the Senate and help flip it blue in 2020, so he can continue fighting for us.

Right now, we are at a crucial moment in Mark's re-election campaign. With under 24 hours until our final FEC fundraising deadline, we are still behind on our can't-miss 200 new supporter goal. These numbers go public next month, and the last thing we want is to put up weak numbers heading into an election year. **Will you chip in now to help us hit that goal and re-elect Mark Warner?** _If | | I'll cut to the chase, Peter:

**We need to raise $9,127 before MIDNIGHT from our online supporters.[Will you make a matched donation right now to help?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890609/7f51f7bc/4a36d1e5/4ef03c7e/3568917918/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191231.1nd__702__&amount=10&recurring=true")** | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890609/7f51f7bc/4a36d1e5/4ef03c7e/3568917918/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191231.1nd__702__&amount=10&recurring=true")
---
**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890609/7f51f7bc/4a36d1e5/4ef03c7e/3568917918/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191231.1nd__702__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
We set our budget carefully based on weekly, monthly, and quarterly goals; this allows us to hire campaign staff, fuel MJ's travel across the state to talk to voters (she's already driven 11,000 miles!), and build the infrastructure we need to defeat Senator Cornyn.

With the last FEC end-of-quarter deadline of the year only hours away, **now is not the time to get off track.[Will you pitch in today toward the $9,127 we need to close out the quarter?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890609/7f51f7bc/4a36d1e5/4ef03c7e/3568917918/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191231.1nd__702__&amount=10&recurring=true")** Every donation will be matched until midnight.

**MJ isn 't taking any money from corporate PACs, so she's relying on folks like you to power this campaign. Thanks for all that you do.**

\-- Team MJ

**[**DONATE**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890609/7f51f7bc/4a36d1e5/4ef03c7e/3568917918/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwMiJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191231.1nd__702__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

name: Urgent MI Senate Update
subject: BREAKING from CBS News:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
BREAKING NEWS, friend: CBS News is reporting that the battle for Senate runs straight through Michigan.
| | | [](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da929/5721a3ed/707f05bf/efb429c/1831833542/VEsH/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
---
**BREAKING NEWS, friends: CBS News is reporting that the battle for Senate runs straight through Michigan.**

That's why the GOP is ALL-IN to defeat Gary Peters:**** Mitch McConnell knows that whoever wins in Michigan will control the Senate and the future of the Supreme Court - and that's why the GOP and national Republicans are spending millions attacking him.
**Now, a recent poll shows Gary Peters statistically tied with his Trump-endorsed right-wing extremist opponent.**
**The ONLY way Democrats can take back the Senate is if we WIN in Michigan!**** But our last end-of-quarter FEC deadline of 2019 is hours away and we still need to raise another $11,262 to win here in Michigan. **

**In a race this close, and w****ith the future of the Senate at stake, falling short just isn't an option:**

name: Andrew Yang
subject: Today’s the day I need you to step up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
I know the Yang Gang has never missed a goal -- so I’m asking you to help keep that record going.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5374%2E377263%2Esq34ZQ) Yang Gang --

Today is the last day of the fourth and final FEC quarter of the year. In other words, if there were ever a day to step up and give just a little more than you were planning to, today’s that day.

We are just 15 hours away from the FEC deadline at midnight, and we still have work to do to hit our ambitious $3.5 million goal.

**[I know the Yang Gang has never missed a goal -- so I’m asking you to help keep that record going. Make your first contribution of $10 or more now and help us hit this $3.5 million goal by midnight tonight.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20992?t=5&akid=5374%2E377263%2Esq34ZQ)** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20992?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5374%2E377263%2Esq34ZQ)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20992?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=5374%2E377263%2Esq34ZQ)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20992?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=5374%2E377263%2Esq34ZQ)
---
| | [$100»](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20992?t=9&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=5374%2E377263%2Esq34ZQ)
---
| [$250 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20992?t=10&express_lane=true&amount=250&akid=5374%2E377263%2Esq34ZQ)
---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20992?t=11&amount=25&akid=5374%2E377263%2Esq34ZQ)
---
**If we miss this goal:** We risk not making it to the debate stage in January, not having enough resources to continue making investments in Iowa, and giving an opening to the mainstream media to write us off.

**If we hit this goal:** We’ll be on track to hit the debate stage in January, have the resources to double down on our investments in Iowa, and give the mainstream media a story they have no choice but to write about -- that we hit a massive $3,500,000 goal.

**[Our task is clear and the stakes are high. Let’s leave it all on the field today, Yang Gang. Chip in $10 or more now.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20992?t=12&akid=5374%2E377263%2Esq34ZQ)**

Thank you,

-Andrew
**Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that, our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Pitch in now so we can show everyone the power of this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20992?t=13&akid=5374%2E377263%2Esq34ZQ)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=5374%2E377263%2Esq34ZQ) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5374%2E377263%2Esq34ZQ) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---

All Rights Reserved
New York, NY
