name: =?utf-8?Q?Ben_Ray_Luj=C3=A1n?=
subject: disturbingly
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | My closest Democratic colleagues all asked for your help: \- Nancy Pelosi \- Adam Schiff \- Kirsten Gillibrand \- James Carville \- Paul Begala \- Khizr Khan \- Deb Haaland \- Gabby Giffords [_**After my closest colleagues -- and President Obama himself -- called you to action to flip the Senate, I thought I would see a surge of support before my biggest deadline of the entire year hits tonight. >>**_](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180") **But disturbingly, it 's starting to look like I might not meet my end-of-year goal.** I only have 14 hours to close this gap, WIN, and DEFEAT McConnell's Senate. I know how hard you work for every cent in your pocket. I wouldn't ask if this wasn't the most important deadline I've ever faced. | [](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")
`**NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com**` `[**Double-Match Your $10 >>**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")`
---

Truthfully, I don't like asking you for money.

But Trump and McConnell are armed with millions to take this seat from us -- and I would be doing you a huge disservice if I didn't defend it with everything I have.

So I'm humbly asking: Will you rush $10?

[**Your generous gift will be 2X-matched until my end-of-year deadline in 14 hours**](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")

| ****[**Chip in $10 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")****
---

****[**Chip in $20 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=20&amounts=10,70,130,180")****
---

****[**Chip in $70 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=70&amounts=10,20,130,180")****
---

****[**Chip in $130 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=130&amounts=10,20,70,180")****
---

****[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b1_lujan_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=20,70,130,180")****
---

Let's win this race and take back the Senate.

Ben Ray

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b782/18e32a7f/50f0b7b6/7b228fd1/1156466547/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b782/18e32a7f/50f0b7b6/7b228fd6/1156466547/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b782/18e32a7f/50f0b7b6/7b228fd7/1156466547/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b782/18e32a7f/50f0b7b6/7b228fd4/1156466547/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b782/18e32a7f/50f0b7b6/7b228fd5/1156466547/VEsHAQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b782/18e32a7f/50f0b7b6/7b228fca/1156466547/VEsHAA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: before midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- Washington is a lousy place to get things done, but now is the wrong time to walk away from the fight of our lives. We need to defeat Trump. We need to take back the Senate. The paths to accomplishing both run right through Colorado, and our team is ready to dig in to do the hard work of turning our state blue in 2020. But the truth is, we have some challenges ahead: Trump is promising to campaign "a lot" in Colorado next year, and my Republican opponent has an army of right-wing billionaires who are going to spend outrageous amounts of money to launch false attacks against me. Our campaign won't stoop down to their level, but we need the resources to fight back and get our message out. Your voice in this fight is going to be the great equalizer in this election, and with our year-end fundraising deadline tonight, I need to ask one more time: [**Can I count on you to make a donation of $10 or more before our FEC deadline tonight at midnight? We 're so close to reaching our critical $500,000 goal -- and I wouldn't ask if it wasn't important.**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191231-lousy?refcode=em-191231-e&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191231-lousy?refcode=em-191231-e&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") With the mess in Washington right now, I believe this is a time for people who know how to do things differently -- who know how to work together to get things done. That's why I'm in this race. Thanks for all you do. -- John | [DONATE TODAY](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191231-lousy?refcode=em-191231-e&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---

Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---
P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
[Unsubscribe here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771592/691c9bd/6f5c25bb/11a73f0e/1688303651/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: DEADLINE: We have to send a conservative to Washington from IA-02
body:
Just any Republican won't do it at this moment in our country's history. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/this-impeachment-drama-is-hurting-america-1523897?e=90fad69796)
---
| | [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=2a9664141a&e=90fad69796)
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=45658364dc&e=90fad69796)
---
| | [Donate Now ›](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=e515d4f334&e=90fad69796 "Donate Now ›")
---
| Peter, We have a major deadline coming up TONIGHT at midnight and need your help. But first I want to tell you why it's so critical that we send a conservative to Washington from IA-02 in 2020.

It can't be just another Republican--it certainly can't be some RINO who has no conservative principles.

[**It has to be a conservative because it's the only way the Trump agenda has a chance in the Swamp. **](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=ca1e0a97e2&e=90fad69796)

We had a Republican House in 2016, and even though it wasn't as bad as it is under socialist Democrats, it was still incapable of passing real border security, defunding Planned Parenthood, or repealing Obamacare.
---
| [ ](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=50340a6469&e=90fad69796)
---
| So if we take back the House in 2020, and want the result to be different, we have to send principled conservatives to Washington that will buck the will of the establishment and deliver for the country.

I did that when I went to Congress during the height of the Obama administration. I clashed with the establishment Speaker at the time, John Boehner.

I know what it's like to take anti-Swamp votes for our kids and grandkids' future, and it's why I think I'm the right person to represent IA-02 in Congress.

[**Will you donate $5, $25, $50, or even $100 by midnight tonight to help us make sure that it's a conservative Republican that gets elected from this district.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=eb53910aea&e=90fad69796) It's critically important if we want to secure the border, defend life, and keep America great.

For Iowa,
[](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=b0ef05daaa&e=90fad69796)
Bobby Schilling
---
| [Donate Now ›](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=72ded47065&e=90fad69796 "Donate Now ›")
---
| | | | | | | [](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=1c39ce2c08&e=90fad69796)
---
| | [](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=2c9c1258b6&e=90fad69796)
---

name: Marsha (iPhone)
subject: Fwd: I wouldn't be writing if this wasn't urgent, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
body:
We're trying to mobilize as many resources to take on the Left as possible, so to bring us across the finish line, I'm increasing our matching from 4X to 5X!

If you would prefer not to receive future emails from Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, click [here.](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDE0NDY0ODQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcyODA5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
**
**
Hey there, Peter, did you see my email?

The last fundraising deadline of the year is TONIGHT! We're trying to mobilize as many resources to take on the Left as possible, so to bring us across the finish line, _**I 'm increasing our matching from 4X to 5X!**_

Chip in to stand with President Trump and defend the conservative Senate Majority before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT, and your impact will go 5 times as far!

\- Marsha

(Sent from my iPhone)

**[Chip in $100=$500](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=8&ms=NDE0NDY0ODQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcyODA5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

[Chip in $10=$50](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDE0NDY0ODQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcyODA5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[5X Match Another Amount](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=24&ms=NDE0NDY0ODQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcyODA5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

\--- Begin Forwarded Message ---

To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
From: Senator Marsha Blackburn (R-TN)
Date: Monday December 30, 2019
Subject: I wouldn't be writing if this wasn't urgent, Peter
**
\- From the Desk of Senator Marsha Blackburn -**

Dear Peter,

I hope this email finds you well-rested and that you've been able to find some time to spend with family, friends and loved ones over the holidays.

As you know, we're closing in on the end of the year and very quickly approaching what will be one of the biggest elections in history.

_Since election night in 2016, the Democrats have refused to accept the outcome --and Donald Trump as their President._

For nearly four years, they've done nothing but throw tantrums, distract and obstruct. And their latest act of political theater--the impeachment sham--demonstrates they're desperate and will do anything to gain power.

This means [**we have to prepare for an all-out battle to defend President Trump 's conservative Senate Majority and protect the White House**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=10&ms=NDE0NDY0ODQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcyODA5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0). We're up against the Left's political machine, fueled with hatred and funded by liberal Hollywood elites.

I wouldn't be writing if this wasn't urgent, Peter.

**The FEC 's last fundraising deadline of the year is TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT.** We need to make a strong statement to the liberals that we're not going to put up with any more of their partisan games. Can I count on you to chip in to our efforts?

**All contributions made through the deadline are being matched 400%!**

[**Join the fight, chip in today >>>**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=16&ms=NDE0NDY0ODQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcyODA5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

How we start the year will set the tone for the rest of the election cycle, Peter. President Trump and all of the conservatives fighting to advance our agenda need to know we have their back.

That's why I'm calling on Team Marsha, one of the strongest grassroots teams in the NATION, to step up and chip in.

You defended the Senate Majority last year.

Next year, the Senate AND the White House are on the line.

_So where will you stand, Peter? _

[**Stand with President Trump & the conservative Senate Majority**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=23&ms=NDE0NDY0ODQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcyODA5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Thank you in advance for your commitment to the conservative agenda and dedication to defending our values from the radical Left's attacks. I hope I can count on you to join our fight.

Sincerely,

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDE0NDY0ODQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcyODA5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Senator Marsha Blackburn (R-TN)

[**Get 4X matched - DONATE NOW**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=NDE0NDY0ODQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2MjcyODA5NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee
authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and
Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account.
---
Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund
PO Box 3750
Brentwood, TN 37024

Since election night in 2016, the Democrats have refused to accept the outcome --and Donald Trump as their President. For nearly four years, they've done nothing but throw tantrums, distract and obstruct. And their latest act of political theater--the impeachment sham--demonstrates they're desperate and will do anything to gain power. This means . We're up against the Left's political machine, fueled with hatred and funded by liberal Hollywood elites. I wouldn't be writing if this wasn't urgent, Peter. The FEC 's last fundraising deadline of the year is TOMORROW at MIDNIGHT. We need to make a strong statement to the liberals that we're not going to put up with any more of their partisan games. Can I count on you to chip in to our efforts? All contributions made through the deadline are being matched 400%! How we start the year will set the tone for the rest of the election cycle, Peter. President Trump and all of the conservatives fighting to advance our agenda need to know we have their back. That's why I'm calling on Team Marsha, one of the strongest grassroots teams in the NATION, to step up and chip in. You defended the Senate Majority last year. Next year, the Senate AND the White House are on the line. So where will you stand, Peter? Thank you in advance for your commitment to the conservative agenda and dedication to defending our values from the radical Left's attacks. I hope I can count on you to join our fight. Sincerely, Senator Marsha Blackburn (R-TN) Paid for by Blackburn Tennessee Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Marsha for Senate, MARSHA PAC, and Tennessee Republican Party Federal Election Account. subject: Did you see this?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MONIKA FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is our last deadline before the primary date.

Hey, I was wondering if you saw Benjamin's email from yesterday? Today is the last day of my final report before my election in March and I would appreciate any support you could give me. Thank you! \- Monika | [](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9e7/7dfbb003/42a9fb89/5527c61f/3254419182/VEsH/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191211_em_decemberdeadline&recurring=auto&refcode2=header")
---
Friend,

We are poised to take back the House in North Carolina's 2nd District in 2020. With the new district lines, NC-02 is more likely to flip blue than ever!

But we are in a crowded primary, and when we flip the 2nd District, we must ensure it's Monika representing us there. Monika is the most qualified person for the job:
* We've seen Monika lead this campaign with integrity, intention, and an attitude of service--exactly the way she plans to advocate for us all in Congress.
* She has spent the last twenty years advocating for thousands of women and children. Congress needs less politicians... and more advocates.
* She is currently serving her third term on the Board of Education for one of the LARGEST school districts in the country.

**We are staying focused on the primary date: March 3, 2020.** But tomorrow--December 31--is our very last major fundraising deadline before voters make their first decisions.

[**We've got a tough road ahead of us. Will you help us raise the funds we need to tell more voters about Monika's vision for the 2nd District?**](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9e7/7dfbb003/42a9fb89/5527c61c/3254419182/VEsE/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mjhfornc") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5»](https://monika.bsd.net/page/m/4449d9e7/7dfbb003/42a9fb89/5527c61d/3254419182/VEsF/?g=DRs0ITjfd5ldy6_maJSnCeA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/monika-johnson-hostler-for-congress?refcode=rtw_20191211_em_decemberdeadline&recurring=auto&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5")

name: Ralph Northam
subject: A Virginia we deserve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
body:
Join me before midnight
|
---

---

---
| | [](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21eb/39260142/425cf552/6263963a/3921163831/VEsH/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa19")
---
Friends-- In November, Virginians sent a clear signal about the direction they want our Commonwealth to go. They want us to continue to build a Virginia that is welcoming and respectful of all, and a Virginia that takes care of its citizens when they need help the most. They want us to continue building a Virginia that is prepared to withstand global and national economic changes, technological advancements, climate change, and more. Virginians want us to move this state forward, not back. They want a state where a child is supported in school, where we prepare for climate realities, and where people can afford to see a doctor when they need to. The budget I presented earlier this month takes care of vulnerable Virginians, invests in long-neglected needs, and puts money away for the inevitable rainy day. It shows that we can protect our AAA bond rating and help at-risk children. We can invest in those children's future by supporting a clean environment, and affordable education. We can teach our full history, and we can put money into reserves. None of these things have to be mutually exclusive. We can do all of this together, and I stand ready to work with anyone who wants to make Virginia a better place. **[I hope you will join me by contributing ](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21eb/39260142/425cf552/62639625/3921163831/VEsE/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa-futurefund")[to the Virginia Future Fund before our end of year fundraising deadline at midnight so that we can c](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21eb/39260142/425cf552/62639625/3921163831/VEsF/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa-futurefund")[ontinue to build the Virginia we all deserve.](https://act.ralphnortham.com/page/m/296f21eb/39260142/425cf552/62639625/3921163831/VEsC/?g=0cliBlH8x8VbPwb7zJ42YiA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/twa-futurefund")** Thank you, Governor Ralph Northam

Richmond VA 23218 |

name: Cory Booker
subject: We're in danger of missing our goal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
What we get done now will decide a lot about the year ahead.
Friend,
You probably don't need another note telling you how important next year is. (And you probably don't need a reminder that next year starts tomorrow -- or that [**our fundraising deadline is tonight at midnight.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191231_CB_20191231-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer="))
I want you to know that we're still $78,493 from reaching our $800,000 end-of-year goal and are in danger of falling short. My team thinks we need to reduce our goal by $40,000. But I know that the incredible grassroots energy from this online community can get us there. **[Chip in whatever you can afford and prove what an underdog campaign like ours can do.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191231_CB_20191231-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
Now, let's take a minute and fast-forward together -- past this deadline, all the caucuses and primaries, past the summer conventions and even the fall debates. Let's skip past Election Day, too.
Think about where we'll be exactly one year from today, staring down the start of 2021. The light at the end of the tunnel is real. We're all getting ready to celebrate not just a new year, but the end of an era marked by cruelty and ugliness -- and a renewed sense of purpose in our country.
**That 's not a dream. It's our future if we build it. What we do today, and in the days ahead, will make that moment real.**
**[I'm asking you to make a donation to help us hit our $800,000 goal before tonight -- because this underdog operation is ready to take this fight to another level, and we need all the momentum we can get.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191231_CB_20191231-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_l3&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**
I can't wait to see what we can do together.
Thank you, and Happy New Year. Let's go make history.
Cory
[](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191231_CB_20191231-fr-CB-EM1-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
| Paid for by Cory 2020

| | Peter, Team Janet here. We wanted to give you an update on our fundraising numbers just a little over 12 hours before the end of the quarter.

[**We need to get 23 more donations by midnight tonight to hit our goals**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=ed98dcd9ea&e=795c6d9796) and have a strong showing for this critical fundraising report. [**Donate $5 >>>>
Donate $25 >>>>

Donate $100 >>>>
Donate $250 >>>>
Donate $500 >>>>**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=64400cb972&e=795c6d9796)
[**Any amount is helpful. $5, $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500 would go a long way in helping power our campaign to flip this district red again and give President Trump the conservative House he needs.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=cf9a0f1ef9&e=795c6d9796)

Janet has worked hard the past few months to learn what matters to the citizens of Oklahoma's 5th district and earn their vote. Now she needs your help to make sure she finishes strong by the deadline tonight.

[**Please consider donating just a few dollars by midnight tonight so we can win the primary, beat Kendra Horn, and defend conservative Oklahoma values in Washington.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=8412727d7e&e=795c6d9796) For Freedom, Team Janet

---
| |
---
| | Hi

2020 is THE defining year of the century.

The **anti-family, anti-God, anti-Constitution, anti-gun Democrats** want to un-do what YOUR vote did in 2016 – they want President Trump out of office. No matter the lies, no matter the cost, **no matter the damage.**

The impeachment debacle led by San Francisco socialist Nancy Pelosi, Shifty Adam Schiff, and the other swamp creatures has been nothing short of a witch hunt. They want to destroy America – and they want to destroy Texas values.

**Even presidential hopeful Democrat Michael Bloomberg has been block walking this past weekend in our very own Fort Bend County.**

That anti-second Amendment Democrat who wants the United States to be a Nanny State **DOES NOT BELONG IN TEXAS**. And yet, the Democrats are pouring money in Texas from across the country and sending in another progressive New Yorker like AOC because THEY MEAN BUSINESS.

President Trump is working around the clock to drain the swamp, and **I’m working tirelessly to get to Washington D.C. to help him in that fight.**

We need to make sure we have every resource at our disposal to defeat these liberal leftists from ruining our country.

As my campaign team and I knock on doors, make phone calls, and spend time with **YOU** the voter, I know in my gut we cannot win this fight **WITHOUT YOU**.

After midnight tonight, we will turn in our fundraising report to the Federal Election Commission. Will you help send me to Washington D.C. as your CD-22 Representative to fight alongside President Trump against the do-nothing Democrats?

**Will you give a gift of...**

subject: Take Your Voice Back From Democrats
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CLAIRE CHASE FOR CONGRESS INC
body:

| | | | | |
---
| Friend,
The Democrats spent all of 2019 (along with tens of millions of your tax dollars) trying to take away your voice from the 2016 election.
[We need your help to show Democrats we won't take this anymore.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oI7QjiQMneruJJZE8VqWOHhu8lA_RgG870uqlNnGqKU_tOEL4huMO1e2KnRnFcxq4B_NU6R1IbRognEvOyGgkkvM8QCk3E-Ee-N6v_FvIRfJOdTYQ-qlit6i2xLNWXpsAKvACYxHz7sE3k85Ri5Xh1ZBgCW0cuyj48pg69w3L-lXFoX62PGHfwwbPnOpgP-T&c=JjXuHBlR6EmZB5uTFRY-DlJpsBf_T5tjA2ZQiEnf8gn5bZY9e3EilQ==&ch=0hT_nhENKDtBF2f89sIbHaaP9a6Ay59_mda5SEtSW8zdmtqH7mOkiQ==)
These last few hours of 2019 is your opportunity to show the Democrats that you are not willing to sit idly by as they try to silence you.

| Your generosity to help me end the final quarter of 2019 strong will show the Democrats that you are tired of being represented by those who don't have your interests at heart and are funded by wealthy, coastal elites.
[Please take a moment today to chip in $5, $10, $15, or even $25 to fight back against the looney left wing.](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001oI7QjiQMneruJJZE8VqWOHhu8lA_RgG870uqlNnGqKU_tOEL4huMO1e2KnRnFcxq4B_NU6R1IbRognEvOyGgkkvM8QCk3E-Ee-N6v_FvIRfJOdTYQ-qlit6i2xLNWXpsAKvACYxHz7sE3k85Ri5Xh1ZBgCW0cuyj48pg69w3L-lXFoX62PGHfwwbPnOpgP-T&c=JjXuHBlR6EmZB5uTFRY-DlJpsBf_T5tjA2ZQiEnf8gn5bZY9e3EilQ==&ch=0hT_nhENKDtBF2f89sIbHaaP9a6Ay59_mda5SEtSW8zdmtqH7mOkiQ==)
Let's send them a message!

| Team, what are your New Year's resolutions?

Are you planning to learn a new skill? Read more? Start a business?

Here at Bennet for America HQ, we've also been thinking about how we can make 2020 our best year yet.

[Here's what we can achieve together in 2020:](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cba8a7/134673f2/893e815/699769c7/2853778226/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nhinvestment?refcode=EM_FR_B1_123119_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000") Ignite our base. name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: How to stop voter suppression from costing us the 2020 election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, In 2016, millions of Democrats stayed home or were intimidated from voting at all, and Donald Trump won Wisconsin by just 0.77%, Michigan by just 0.23%, and Pennsylvania by just 0.72%. But if Democrats fail to show up to vote in 2020, Trump will win again, we'll lose our House majority, and Mitch McConnell will maintain control of the Senate. If Trump wins re-election after surviving impeachment, he'll grow increasingly unhinged. Kids in cages, the Muslim Ban, tax cuts for the wealthy and big corporations, withdrawal from the Paris climate accords, calling white supremacists "very fine people," and calling his impeachment a "lynching." That all will look tame. Trump will stack the Supreme Court with more lifetime appointments, more justices like Brett Kavanaugh. Trump will gut the EPA. He'll destroy Obamacare and defund Medicare and Social Security in favor of more and more tax cuts for the wealthy and big corporations. Our mission at When Democrats Turn Out is to prevent a repeat of the 2016 election by educating voters in key swing states. Our mission is to support every single key Senate battleground race and dozens of House candidates. Our mission is to beat Trump in 2020. But right now, we're falling VERY short of our fundraising goals. If we can't raise another $1,900 today, we'll need to significantly scale back our strategy in 2020. We do not accept corporate contributions or contributions from Big Oil, Big Banks, or Big Pharma. Our work is 100% funded by thousands of grassroots supporters across the country. Our work is funded by you. [**Peter , if you care about stopping Trump, electing a Democrat to the White House in 2020, and removing Mitch McConnell from power, then please, we're asking you to please donate $5 or more immediately to support our work turning out voters, stopping GOP voter suppression, taking back the Senate from Mitch McConnell, and getting Trump out of the White House. Can you give just $5 now?**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf37/6e9863e8/1763d509/1db04abb/2003142773/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191231a.ND&refcode2=MdGDVlspGzVM5jO1p6W2") Your help is critical to pushing back and winning in 2020. Thank you, The WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdf37/6e9863e8/1763d509/1db04abb/2003142773/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191231a.ND&refcode2=MdGDVlspGzVM5jO1p6W2")

name: U.S. Senator Ed Markey
subject: I want to make sure you understand how important you are to this campaign's success.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
I'm personally reaching out one last time to ask for your support. | |
---
| Friends -

We're closing the books on our final FEC deadline of the year at midnight, so I'm personally reaching out one last time to ask for your support. I want to make sure you understand how important you are to this campaign's success.

I only know one surefire way to win a fight like the one ahead of us. It requires building a movement of people willing to do the hard work it takes to win.

Both in this race and in the United States Senate, I need as many people as possible standing alongside me dedicated to our shared mission of passing our progressive agenda.

That's how we'll pass the Green New Deal and Medicare for all and win this race.

Let me be clear: These battles will be enormously difficult. But I'm confident that together we will rise to meet the challenge.

To do that, we will have to do more than anyone thinks is possible, and that starts with what we do today -- before the FEC deadline. So I'm asking:

**[Will you please make a $3 donation to our campaign before midnight? Your contribution will go a long way toward helping us hit our goal. There's never been a more important time for us to demonstrate our grassroots strength.](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dffd/693b8b0a/43627604/72de7342/2885343067/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzEtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191231-1-full")**

I'm serious when I say that we need to build an army of supporters. People-powered movements are among the strongest forces in our democracy. I'm counting on you to be a part of ours because, if you are, then I know we will win.

In solidarity,

Ed **[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dffd/693b8b0a/43627604/72de7342/2885343067/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzEtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191231-1-full")**

---

---

name: Lark
subject: Chip Roy and Ted Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wendy Davis for Congress
body:
We can't afford to fall further behind.
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email#?refcode=jtk16-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
[](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email#?refcode=jtk16-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")
Friend - I have some difficult news for you: Tonight is Wendy's most important fundraising deadline of the year, and we're falling $2,864 short of our FEC goal.
**POLITICO is calling this one of the biggest races of 2020, but right now, our extremist GOP opponent Chip Roy is massively out-raising us with nearly TWICE as much cash in the bank.**
We can't afford to fall further behind. Roy and his mentor, Ted Cruz, have some of the most anti-choice records in Congress, and GOP leaders and megadonors are lining his campaign coffers to keep him in the House and continue the attack on women's reproductive freedoms.
With the future of our democracy at stake, Wendy is counting on your immediate contribution:
**[Will you make a contribution of $3 or more- every dollar you can right now - to help Wendy Davis flip this seat from red to blue, expand our Democratic majority in the House and hold Trump accountable?](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.%3D/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/wdfc_email#?refcode=jtk16-fr-nd&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1&amount=3")**

Thanks so much.
Lark Herron

If you'd like to support Wendy Davis for Congress, you can [click here to make a donation](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a8b/704929dc/160bdf30/399393d2/2459492861/VEsC/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wd4c_emailfooter").
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here](https://go.wendydavisforcongress.com/page/m/4f361a8b/704929dc/160bdf30/399393d5/2459492861/VEsD/?g=ghm7IcQot1BdylMggyL2QMA "https://wendyforcongress.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/fewer-emails").

name: Beto O'Rourke
subject: Here’s to 2020!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
This weekend, Amy and I worked with 30 volunteers in our home in our first
Powered by People event.

These amazing El Paso volunteers made hundreds of phone calls to voters in
Fort Bend County to let them know about Dr. Eliz Markowitz and her
campaign to represent House District 28 in the Texas legislature.

[1]Volunteers for Eliz Markowitz at Beto's House

I loved the energy, the commitment and the passion from the volunteers.
And I loved making phone calls alongside them. My favorite was to a young
voter named Stephanie.

* “Hi, this is Beto O’Rourke calling on behalf of Dr. Eliz Markowitz.”

* “Shut up!”

* “No really, this is Beto. And we really need you to vote on the first
day of early voting, January 21, for Dr. Markowitz.”

* “OK! I’m on it!”

I spoke with a man named Khaled who not only promised to vote for Eliz, he
offered to put a group together to listen to her speak so that she could
reach more voters in his circle of family and friends.

I talked with Bethany who was with her three children when I called. After
she committed to vote for Eliz, I asked her if she would volunteer with
us.

“I’ve never knocked on doors before, that sounds kind of intimidating,”
she told me. I assured her that it’s as simple as introducing yourself to
your neighbors and telling them about the importance of this election. She
thought about it for a second and then said, “I’m in.”

It was a good day, the volunteers, the voters, the progress we made.

We will follow up yesterday’s effort with more phone banks, more block
walks, and more direct voter engagement. It’s how we’ll help Dr. Markowitz
win her race, and it’s how we’ll help other courageous candidates running
across Texas.

I hope you’ll commit to joining us in this effort - Powered by People - in
2020. If we all pitch in, we can win the Texas state house, pick up more
seats in Congress, defeat John Cornyn and ensure that the Democratic
nominee against Trump can win Texas’ 38 electoral college votes.

We’ll do this by organizing and mobilizing everyday Texans to help their
neighbors register to vote, commit to vote, and actually vote on Election
Day.

It’s our best chance to do what this state and this country needs at this
critical moment.

Happy New Year! I’m excited to work with you in 2020.

Beto

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/42032?refcode=ema20191231-75773&t=1001&akid=75773%2E444211%2E03xUoN ]Contribute »

name: Claudia Tenney (personal)
subject: reaching out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
My finance team just let me know that we are only $1,786 short of our year-end fundraising goal, and we need your help to meet it. | |
---
|
---
Peter, I’m sorry to email you so close to New Year’s Eve festivities, but this is important.

My finance team just let me know that we are only $1,786 short of our year-end fundraising goal, and we need your help to meet it.

A group of generous donors offered to double-match all contributions made yesterday, and now they’re extending their match until 11:59pm tonight so everyone has a chance to triple their contribution!

**Use this unique link to double-match your contribution and help us defeat Anthony Brindisi in 2020:[https://secure.winred.com/tenney-for-congress/action-67656/](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7319ab70063f4012be64c8af839b5046&_e=VodQ273W5roVGDel-8rekTLbwlW84KYXwaKdfyApuh6bltJt92Eue3GAU3TkQ3LXVIYCzxykFBvX5uXnredmwIuYedoFaXxnXaZ2Zgmvb_W1o4umEpNjCBu4hgPAhgfdEbD6vsAnCC9i_l-IN_x8VJR6rRnxU17r2ilDGf8TtRaORbZ9lc-YjtuqAjickeeyFKEsZqPa1OacHjKAwXGj73j_BwcksF5pEqzbWf8jdaW4gALoslZIpp0q82IqVNZjXpLjMzBVDtKz1mcn7KjcGYlTW0s0WYJb6loPMhSOk2lcrD4zVSQDawQBdoHzcxJevV-A4QQiFPDT5ma_a86cyQM3LhZP_Cb0vwkdRujS3W9hCqMrliVG2-E7wGvn5BgD-jcZp7lxXrUddYaMTW6yiZAHJ11y1dUP15QMIW6whZg%3D)**

Anthony Brindisi has betrayed the people of Upstate New York so many times, Peter. He has repeatedly voted for liberal policies that don’t reflect our values.

While I was in Congress, I reformed the tax code to empower individuals and small businesses, delivered pay raises for our troops and reforms to the VA for our veterans, and secured resources for New Yorkers to fight the opioid epidemic.

I’m running for Congress so I can represent hard-working Upstate New Yorkers like you, not the D.C. elite or out-of-state donors.

Please chip in whatever you can to help us meet our year-end deadline and defeat Anthony Brindisi in 2020: **[https://secure.winred.com/tenney-for-congress/action-67656/](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=7319ab70063f4012be64c8af839b5046&_e=VodQ273W5roVGDel-8rekTLbwlW84KYXwaKdfyApuh6bltJt92Eue3GAU3TkQ3LXVIYCzxykFBvX5uXnredmwIuYedoFaXxnXaZ2Zgmvb_W1o4umEpNjCBu4hgPAhgfdEbD6vsAnCC9i_l-IN_x8VJR6rRnxU17r2ilDGf8TtRaORbZ9lc-YjtuqAjickeeyFKEsZqPa1OacHjKAwXGj7-YkESOAEsnGFBybab8XhBtL5gJ6Tq5HPX3hu8F4AdjNoHta_Yz8Vg54LSF6WHaqOC9QJi1S7EMYmGmRTmLqv_6XOCFnpRjgz75dXGk6dofg1DWoH5MIU73xi-42i-0q-L8E22ijUv5HeFyY90VKdTaasw_ByWTlAuDfSuTEMk9yuoc8Ih4HUqtUiF_nkonqgYwE-6TLhwQ_PJilSfiFJS0%3D)**

Thanks for your support, Peter.

\-- Claudia

Sent from my iPhone.

#
Meet Tim Ryan
---
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.

name: Sara Gideon
subject: hey
body:
I wanted to send a quick note out before the day gets away from all of us.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e35/4bef7a87/6a1d4952/287f9fd1/3580637476/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Good morning, friends.
I wanted to send a quick note out before the day gets away from all of us. Thanks for reading.
As you know, tonight at midnight we close the books on the final FEC fundraising deadline of the year. It's a big one.
And what we are trying to do is generate as many individual donations as we possibly can before it ends. Because when it's over Susan Collins is going to report her fundraising totals and we will, as well.
These numbers are important. Everyone will be watching to see where we land. But more importantly, it's these donations that will help us run the kind of campaign that can beat Susan Collins.
So with the clock ticking toward midnight, I am asking:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to our campaign before midnight tonight? Use this link.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e35/4bef7a87/6a1d4952/287f9fd0/3580637476/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzEtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191231-1-full")
Thank you again for everything you've done to support this campaign. I am working hard, every day, and it means a lot to know that we're in this together.
Happy new year,
Sara Gideon
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e35/4bef7a87/6a1d4952/287f9fd0/3580637476/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzEtMS1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191231-1-full")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e35/4bef7a87/6a1d4952/287f9fd7/3580637476/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. If you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e35/4bef7a87/6a1d4952/287f9fd6/3580637476/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e35/4bef7a87/6a1d4952/287f9fd5/3580637476/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: OUR LAST CHANCE TO SUPPORT ERICA SMITH IN 2019!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica For US - Senate 2020 Campaign Committee
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LtgfGEZKf-rhB6sg6KwHiaY86NOJa40AhHUqPG0mNos=/VZXxfEn9dZq6PW0Tq0KBTQGrtSHnuQUW6gykOqKpKBo=)

Dear friends,

Make no mistake about it: **we are in the fight of our lives in this election.** But the good news is that right here in North Carolina my team is building the most diverse, multi-racial, multi-generational voter coalition anywhere in the U.S., determined to unseat Republican Sen. Thom Tillis and help flip the U.S. Senate!

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LtgfGEZKf-rhB6sg6KwHiaY86NOJa40AhHUqPG0mNos=/5xGjs2Q4jsUAAYo0IO631W2ZlRQNZavCBQjr8NscL1I=)

That coalition is US! But we can't do it without the resources to carry on the fight. If you haven't yet, please** join the thousands who have already contributed to help our campaign meet its critical end-of-year goal. **

Please do it now, because our reporting year ends at midnight TONIGHT. Next week people will be studying our FEC filing to judge the depth of our grassroots support. Every contribution, no matter how small or large, helps.

From Nags Head to Cherokee, and Mount Airy to Southport, I am criss-crossing the state to meet and listen to voters everywhere, in order to ensure that all our voices are heard when I'm seated in the U.S. Senate in 2021.

**Check out my latest campaign video** by clicking here: **[One of Us For All of Us](https://act.myngp.com/el/LtgfGEZKf-rhB6sg6KwHiaY86NOJa40AhHUqPG0mNos=/9wfucjPd7RiXMUrSRjoQEZe_puWngBto6qjFcct-GRk=).**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LtgfGEZKf-rhB6sg6KwHiaY86NOJa40AhHUqPG0mNos=/5xGjs2Q4jsUAAYo0IO631W2ZlRQNZavCBQjr8NscL1I=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LtgfGEZKf-rhB6sg6KwHiaY86NOJa40AhHUqPG0mNos=/5xGjs2Q4jsUAAYo0IO631W2ZlRQNZavCBQjr8NscL1I=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LtgfGEZKf-rhB6sg6KwHiaY86NOJa40AhHUqPG0mNos=/5xGjs2Q4jsUAAYo0IO631W2ZlRQNZavCBQjr8NscL1I=)

Thank you so much for your support!
NC State Sen. Erica D. Smith
[EricaForUS.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/LtgfGEZKf-rhB6sg6KwHiaY86NOJa40AhHUqPG0mNos=/mwuE7tfM58o0OMR74BAyEYDz7663h51tsZhmxWtHCws=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rob=20Ortt=20for=20Congress?=
subject: 2019 Survey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB ORTT FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
| Dear Friend,

The conclusion of 2019 marks the end of what can only be described as a disheartening and frustrating first year of legislative control by radically-regressive Democrats in Albany. It also marks the warning sign as to what will come if Democrats and socialists gain control of Washington, D.C.

Their playbook is right in front of us for all to see. If we do not stop them this November, what we have seen take place in New York will spread across the country.

Today, I am taking a survey and also giving you a reminder of the mess that these past 12 months have been. I want you to have your say. What do you think is the worst thing that Democrats did in Albany this past year?

Take my survey at this **[link](https://gmail.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=4946e5d744&e=9f843ba602) **and let me know your opinion on New York City Democrats' most dangerous policy - choose from abortion on demand, billions in new taxes and fees, giveaways to illegal immigrants or numerous others.

Thank you and God Bless.

clean_body: | | | | | | Dear Friend, The conclusion of 2019 marks the end of what can only be described as a disheartening and frustrating first year of legislative control by radically-regressive Democrats in Albany. It also marks the warning sign as to what will come if Democrats and socialists gain control of Washington, D.C. Their playbook is right in front of us for all to see. If we do not stop them this November, what we have seen take place in New York will spread across the country. Today, I am taking a survey and also giving you a reminder of the mess that these past 12 months have been. I want you to have your say. What do you think is the worst thing that Democrats did in Albany this past year? Take my survey at this and let me know your opinion on New York City Democrats' most dangerous policy - choose from abortion on demand, billions in new taxes and fees, giveaways to illegal immigrants or numerous others. Thank you and God Bless. Rob | "Donate Here" | Missed my campaign launch video? name: Team Yang
subject: We need 600 people in Pennsylvania to step up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
Become a part of something historic.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5368%2E377263%2EFswvUy) Yang Gang --

We’re at a pivotal moment in this campaign.

The FEC deadline is in just a couple of hours. We need to send the message that we are a top contender for the nomination. That’s why we raised our public goal for this team -- $3.5 million by midnight tonight.

This goal is extremely difficult, and not many campaigns would try it, but we know the power of the Yang Gang and we’re counting on you to be the difference.

[We need you to be one of 600 people in Pennsylvania that steps up and makes a contribution of $10 or more to our campaign today. Please pitch in now:](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20970?t=5&akid=5368%2E377263%2EFswvUy) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20970?t=6&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5368%2E377263%2EFswvUy)
---
| | [$25 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20970?t=7&express_lane=true&amount=25&akid=5368%2E377263%2EFswvUy)
---
| [$50 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20970?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=5368%2E377263%2EFswvUy)

---
| | [OTHER »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20970?t=11&amount=25&akid=5368%2E377263%2EFswvUy)
---
Together, we are building a campaign that is breaking the mold at every turn. It’s why we’re making this goal public and showing the world whether we hit it -- or fall short.

**This is our chance to vault Andrew into the top tier. Help us hit one of our most ambitious goals yet. Rush a contribution today:** [https://act.yang2020.com/go/EOQ-goal](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20970?t=12)

Let’s do this,

Team Yang
**Our end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast, and after that, our fundraising numbers will go public for the world to see. Pitch in now so we can show everyone the power of this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/20970?t=13&akid=5368%2E377263%2EFswvUy)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=5368%2E377263%2EFswvUy) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=5368%2E377263%2EFswvUy) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang

---
| | | **Bring on the New Year!**
---
| What an incredible year 2019 has been! We feel immensely grateful for the tremendous support from so many that we have received in this first year of our campaign. It's the final day of the year, and we'd love to add your name to our list of supporters as we start this new year strong.

---
| [Make a donation today!](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=f830396f0d&e=1050d051da "Make a donation today!")
---
| Kansas needs conservative leadership in Washington D.C. We have all watched this year as the Democrat-led House of Representatives has wasted taxpayers' time and money attacking our President for political gain. It's a pathetic perversion of power and we can not afford to let the Democrats gain any more power in Washington.

The 2nd congressional district seat in Kansas is vulnerable to being lost to the Democrats in 2020. _**It must be held by a strong conservative who stands with President Trump. With his solid pro-life and pro-second amendment record and his commitment to serve the people of Kansas with integrity, Jake LaTurner is the conservative Republican candidate Kansans can trust.**_

He is committed to serving our state and will not back down when the pressure is on.

Please consider [contributing to the campaign today](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=8488ee5703&e=1050d051da) as we kickoff the new year. Your support is invaluable and will help us reach our goal of securing this critical seat.

All our best to you in the new year!

Team LaTurner

name: Charles Booker
subject: Are you with this movement, folks?
body:
|

Folks, This movement is based on a simple idea: No matter where you’re from or how much money is in your pocket, **your voice matters.** But I have to be honest with you, folks: whether this movement has a place in this Senate race depends on what grassroots supporters like you do before midnight tonight. **_****_**[I know we can make this happen. | Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc96f/3eb3e2fc/6a5359f3/744ed943/726275382/VEsHBg/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on&utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=13+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20191231_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191231_em_fr_b1_castro_all")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc96f/3eb3e2fc/6a5359f3/744ed942/726275382/VEsHAQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=14+-+here&utm_campaign=20191231_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191231_em_fr_b1_castro_all"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc96f/3eb3e2fc/6a5359f3/744ed941/726275382/VEsHAA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=juliancastro&utm_content=15+-+here&utm_campaign=20191231_em_fr_b1_castro_all&source=20191231_em_fr_b1_castro_all"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.

body:
The countdown is on! If you haven't yet contributed to support David Hill, now is the time. We need you to get involved with this campaign to bring much-needed change for this nation and help fix Congress. **As the clock counts down to midnight tonight, we will run out of time to fundraise in 2019 — and to show the politicians in D.C. that the people of Oklahoma district five want new leadership in the House. **

Now is the time to tell them. I'm with David! Chip in $20.20 for 2020 >> Please contribute as much as you can today to ensure we put up a winning fight in the new year.

Thank you,

Team Hill PAID FOR BY DAVID HILL FOR OKLAHOMA, INC | | Friend,

We’ll keep this short (we know you probably have big New Year’s Eve plans and we don’t want to get in the way!), but we wanted to reach out one more time before 2020.

We understand that the holidays are a busy time of year and that not everyone can give every time we ask, but we wanted to give you one last chance to make a difference for us in 2019.

name: MJ Hegar
subject: my last email on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I've had a wonderful holiday season with my family, and I hope you have too. I couldn't be more excited to ring in the new year with my family. But my team and I have work to do first, because our FEC

---
| | Peter,

I've had a wonderful holiday season with my family, and I hope you have too. I couldn't be more excited to ring in the new year. But my team and I have work to do first, because our FEC deadline is at **midnight**.

How much we raise in 2019 will determine what kind of campaign we can run in 2020, and ultimately our chances of defeating Senator Cornyn next November.

Our end-of-quarter deadline is just hours away, and we still haven't quite hit our goal. So before the ball drops, I'm asking all of our top supporters: **[can I count on you to chip in by midnight?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489060b/7f51f7bc/4acb6e51/4ef03c5b/1580511579/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191231.2nd__700__&amount=10&recurring=true")** Every dollar you donate before midnight will be matched -- that means that your donation will go twice as far.

Senator Cornyn's D.C. special interest pals are already pouring millions into this election -- but our campaign has something better: this grassroots team. **[Will you rush a donation now?](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/6489060b/7f51f7bc/4acb6e51/4ef03c5b/1580511579/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwMCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191231.2nd__700__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

Thanks, Peter. Your support is what keeps this campaign going.

\-- MJ

---

|
---

name: Martin Heinrich
subject: please read from start to finish
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by People for Ben
body:
---
| | Hi there, Back in 2008, Ben Ray Lujan and I were both part of the same freshman class of U.S. representatives -- rushing into Congress on a blue wave of Obama-era momentum for change. In the years that followed, I couldn't have asked for a better partner in Congress -- and New Mexico couldn't have asked for a better leader. Ben Ray has always been a fierce champion for our values -- fighting to protect our public lands, advance universal health care, and make life better for working families. [_**That 's why I'm so proud to be endorsing him for the U.S. Senate -- and why I hope you'll rush $5 to help Ben Ray raise 984 more gifts before his end-of-quarter deadline.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b2_heinrich_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") Now more than ever, the Senate needs people like Ben Ray to go toe-to-toe with Republicans over the challenges facing our state and country. In 2020, we have a historic shot to oust Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate -- but if we lose Ben Ray's race, all hope to flip the Senate will be lost. You can take it from me: Ben Ray is the kind of person we need in the Senate. Last year, I watched him take on the GOP and billions of dollars in dark money to flip the House blue and win our Democratic majority. **So I know -- without a shadow of a doubt -- he'll not only keep this critical Senate seat out of Republicans' hands, he'll help flip the ENTIRE Senate, too. ** [_**Ben Ray still needs 984 gifts to reach his critical end-of-quarter goal. Can I count on your $5 to help him make it to the Senate in November?**_](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b2_heinrich_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") | | ******[**Chip in $5 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b2_heinrich_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $25 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b2_heinrich_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=5,50,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $50 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b2_heinrich_all&recurring=auto&amount=50&amounts=5,25,100,250")******
---

******[**Chip in $100 now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b2_heinrich_all&recurring=auto&amount=100&amounts=5,25,50,250")******
---

******[**Chip in another amount now >> **](https://secure.benrlujan.%3D/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=20191231_em_fr_b2_heinrich_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")******
---

Thank you for your help,

Martin Heinrich

|
---
[](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b783/18e32a7f/50f537bd/7b228fcc/301745306/VEsO/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b783/18e32a7f/50f537bd/7b228fcd/301745306/VEsP/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan") [](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b783/18e32a7f/50f537bd/7b228fc2/301745306/VEsHBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.instagram.com/benraylujan/?hl=en")
Ben Ray Lujan is running to be the first Hispanic Senator from New Mexico in more than 40 years. No one like Ben Ray has ever run for Senate before. He led the charge to take back the House for the American people and Democrats (and succeeded by a historic margin) and now he's running to take back the Senate too.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because Ben Ray isn't taking a cent of corporate PAC money. His campaign is 100% people-powered. And the polls show we have a once-in-a-lifetime shot to finally defeat Mitch McConnell and take back the Senate. But we can't do this without winning New Mexico. Will you be a part of this historic movement?
**[DONATE](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b783/18e32a7f/50f537bd/7b228fc3/301745306/VEsHBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
We're counting on you to stick with us for the long-haul. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, [_**please let us know.**_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b783/18e32a7f/50f537bd/7b228fc0/301745306/VEsHBw/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails") If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [_here_](https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/m/40f6b783/18e32a7f/50f537bd/7b228fc1/301745306/VEsHBg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

People for Ben
PO Box 25371
Albuquerque, NM 87125

| | Paid for and authorized by People for Ben.

name: John Hickenlooper 2020
subject: Bump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
| | Folks -- The response to John's message yesterday was absolutely incredible, but we're sorry to say our projections still have us falling a bit short of our goal before tonight's FEC deadline. **[So, John asked us to forward his message and see one more time if you'd donate $10 or more to our campaign today?](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191231-percent-lift?refcode=em-191231-a&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** | [DONATE](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191231-percent-lift?refcode=em-191231-a&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
_\---------- Forwarded message from John Hickenlooper ----------_
Folks -- I'll make this quick.
Our year-end FEC fundraising deadline is coming up tomorrow and before I ask you to donate again, I wanted to pause and explain what this deadline means for our campaign.
We're up against an incumbent Republican senator who is undermining progress on issues like health care and climate change by following in lockstep with Mitch McConnell's obstruction and partisan political games and voting 98% of the time with Donald Trump.
Because he's a reliable vote for the Trump-McConnell agenda, we expect deep-pocketed Republican interests to come through for him so he can report a very strong number to the FEC next month.
Our campaign also needs strong numbers, but we need to do it the right way: no money from corporate PACs, no right-wing megadonors -- just everyday folks stepping up to help us flip this seat.
[**We 're so close to hitting our $500,000 year-end fundraising goal before the deadline, so that's why I'm asking you one more time to make a contribution of $10 or more today:**](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191231-percent-lift?refcode=em-191231-a&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191231-percent-lift?refcode=em-191231-a&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Every single day, folks like you are stepping up to support our campaign and helping us even the odds against our Republican opponent and his supporters in Trump and McConnell's networks.
Thanks,
-- John
[DONATE TODAY](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191231-percent-lift?refcode=em-191231-a&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---

Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
---
P.O. Box 18886, Denver, CO 80218
[Unsubscribe here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771597/691c9bd/6f5fa987/11a73cb2/3266685905/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

name: SaraGideon.com
subject: Good news!
body:
Sara's been checking in.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e37/4bef7a87/6a1e8ff0/287f9f81/600128617/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends -
Good news. We are off to a great start today. Donations are coming in and we're on our way to hitting our goals for the deadline.
Sara's been checking in, too. Like you, she's going about her day, but this deadline is big enough that we'll get an occasional call to see where we're at and if we've reached this goal.
She is VERY thankful for every donation that comes in.
So we want to do something special here. Tomorrow morning we want to give Sara a list of everyone who contributes between now and midnight to help us reach our goal before this FEC deadline ends.
Contributions of all sizes... it doesn't matter. Just make a donation and we'll put your name right at the top of the list for Sara. What do you say?
[**Make $3 contribution before our FEC deadline ends tonight at midnight and we 'll add your name to a list of Deadline Day donors that we'll give to Sara Gideon tomorrow morning. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e37/4bef7a87/6a1e8ff0/287f9f80/600128617/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzEtMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191231-2-b")
Thank you -- again. These emails go a long way toward funding this campaign, which means they go a long way toward beating Susan Collins. So your response is pretty important.
All my best,
Amy Mesner
Campaign Manager
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e37/4bef7a87/6a1e8ff0/287f9f80/600128617/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzEtMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-dec-deadline?refcode=em191231-2-b")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to receive fewer emails please **[click here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802e37/4bef7a87/6a1e8ff0/287f9f87/600128617/VEsC/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://gideon.bsd.net/page/s/receive-fewer-emails/")**. name: Last Chance @ 314 Action Team
subject: Let’s talk about Mark Kelly in Arizona 🌵
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| We understand that your inbox is being flooded by campaigns and organizations begging and pleading for donations before the end of the year. But before we ring in the new year, I want to remind you of the facts.

We have until midnight to hit our end-of-year goal. Your donations will go towards winning back the Senate and expanding our presence in the House. **If we don 't win back the Senate and protect our majority in the House, then we will suffer the effects of at LEAST 2 more years of a do-nothing, climate crisis.** Honestly, I don't think our planet can take much more of that.

[Right now, we are $3,363 away from hitting our end-of-year goal.](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+Right+now+we+are+3363+away+from+hitting+&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191231_2_11&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191231_2_11&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191231_2_11")

[If 12 people from your area chip in $10, then we hit our goal right before the ball drops. ---
| |
---
| | Friends,

Our first donation reporting deadline is tonight at midnight! We have a chance to show the strength and momentum of this campaign.

Washington is a sham. It’s absurd that Democrats are trying to act as though they care about our constitution and our founding fathers. As your congressman I won’t put up with these antics. We need to work on solving the complex problems in our federal government, not trample our founders intent.

Please consider [donating $25, $50, $100, or more.](https://votehindman.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3c2977729674d0893a093b37e&id=31c0946c45&e=52e38a8253) Every dollar helps. Let's finish the year strong.

I can't thank you enough for your support,
-George

name: Booker HQ
subject: Earlier this month, there were more billionaires on the debate stage than Black people. Now, it looks like there may not be any candidates of color at the January debate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Hey team, Only five candidates have qualified for the January debate -- Joe Biden, Pete Buttigieg, Amy Klobuchar, Bernie Sanders, and Elizabeth Warren. Cory emailed you yesterday about the increasing likelihood that there won't be any candidates of color on that stage. **We 're reaching out again today to ask for your help to make sure this isn't the case. [Chip in today to help get Cory closer to qualifying for the January debate.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191231_BHQ_20191231-fr-BHQ-EM2-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Right now, a few polls are all that stand between Cory and a podium on the next debate stage -- _we already hit the grassroots donor requirement, thanks to supporters like you!_ **But here 's the thing: there have not been any qualifying polls from an early state since before the November debate.** Our teams on the ground have reported seeing great momentum and an increase in support among caucus-goers and voters since Cory's winning performance at the November debate. But the polls have not reflected this because they just haven't been conducted. This makes the road ahead pretty tough. But Cory has never been one to step away from tough challenges, and he's not going to now. The deck may be stacked against us, but we're fighting with everything we have to make sure Cory is on that stage next month. **[Can you help?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191231_BHQ_20191231-fr-BHQ-EM2-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** We can do this, together. Booker HQ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191231_BHQ_20191231-fr-BHQ-EM2-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f68/5fca0d19/7b17f372/291cc514/1716492668/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f68/5fca0d19/7b17f372/291cc513/1716492668/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f68/5fca0d19/7b17f372/291cc512/1716492668/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f68/5fca0d19/7b17f372/291cc511/1716492668/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f68/5fca0d19/7b17f372/291cc510/1716492668/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f68/5fca0d19/7b17f372/291cc514/1716492668/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

"=" Right now, a few polls are all that stand between Cory and a podium on the next debate stage -- we already hit the grassroots donor requirement, thanks to supporters like you! But here 's the thing: there have not been any qualifying polls from an early state since before the November debate. Our teams on the ground have reported seeing great momentum and an increase in support among caucus-goers and voters since Cory's winning performance at the November debate. But the polls have not reflected this because they just haven't been conducted. This makes the road ahead pretty tough. But Cory has never been one to step away from tough challenges, and he's not going to now. The deck may be stacked against us, but we're fighting with everything we have to make sure Cory is on that stage next month. "=" We can do this, together. Booker HQ "=" | | Paid for by Cory 2020 P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved. Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible. If you got this message from a friend, "" This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on "", "", and "". It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe "". Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info "".

name: Tim Walz
subject: Good news
disclaimer_text: paid for by Tim Walz for Governor
body:
| My friend, Looking back on 2019, I'm overwhelmed with gratitude -- for you, for this campaign, and for the opportunity to serve our state. We've accomplished so much together over the past year, and none of it would've been possible without your support. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/0tzevIgfhOUgU4CjjygyzMiOg7D1yK-8MnEhN7dK3Os=/khZ_Cf4GicIwUQOx7hBoYeUEGDuAm6JrTE50vFrYHOc=?refcode=header&amount=25)
---
My friend,
Looking back on 2019, I'm overwhelmed with gratitude -- for you, for this campaign, and for the opportunity to serve our state. We've accomplished so much together over the past year, and none of it would've been possible without your support.
To cap it off, I'm proud to report good news: We've made an incredible comeback and are within $1,100 of reaching our 2019 budget targets.
All we need to do is keep up the pace, which is why I'm reaching out one last time to ask:
[**Will you make your last contribution of the decade to help us finish strong so we can support our allies up and down the ballot and keep Minnesota blue in 2020?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/0tzevIgfhOUgU4CjjygyzMiOg7D1yK-8MnEhN7dK3Os=/khZ_Cf4GicIwUQOx7hBoYeUEGDuAm6JrTE50vFrYHOc=?refcode=body&amount=25)
