name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Will It Be Foresight or Hindsight?
body:
You have a decision

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/will-it-be-foresight-or-hindsight?e=41f8e27552)

Friends,

One year from now, will Kansans look back on 2020 as a year of foresight or regretful hindsight?

Will we have had the foresight to nominate and elect as our Kansas U.S. Senator a proven pro-jobs, pro-freedom Kansas businessman?

I need you on my team today. We are just hours away from our finance reporting deadline. Will you help us meet our goal?

Any amount large or small - $10, $25, $50, $100, $250 - makes an impact.
DONATE TODAY (https://secure.anedot.com/lindstrom-for-senate/donate?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=f67ed78f45-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_31_05_56&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-f67ed78f45-180644441)

OR will we look back with regretful hindsight –

Did Kansas Republicans nominate a free spending Topeka politician caught diverting state tax dollars to fund her campaign staff...or...a Washington politician who voted to add more than $1 trillion to the national debt, while tarnishing his office by ridiculing poor Americans...or...a perennial politician rejected by President Trump for delivering the Kansas governor’s office to Democrats and cementing another generation of leftwing ideology on the state supreme court?

Now is the time to exercise foresight.
DONATE TODAY (https://secure.anedot.com/lindstrom-for-senate/donate?utm_source=Lindstrom+for+Senate&utm_campaign=f67ed78f45-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_12_31_05_56&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_fcd34823bf-f67ed78f45-180644441)

Thank you for standing with me as we take a stand together for our families and our nation!

Dave

P.S. Don't forget to follow us online: www.lindstromforsenate.com and on social media @LindstromforKS

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hattersley for Congress
body:
Hey Peter,

My apologies for the late email, but I just got an update from our finance team and I had to share it with you: We’re only $346 away from reaching our goal for the year!

I’d hate for our campaign to start the new year coming up just short of our goal. Being so close, I felt the need to make one more ask.

If you can, please consider contributing to help us reach our goal before midnight.

We were starting to lose hope, Team.

Republicans were spending MILLIONS to attack Democrats and advance the Trump agenda, **but Democrats weren 't donating to help us fight back. **

But then President Obama asked you to make a commitment to electing Democrats... and donations went THROUGH THE ROOF!

There are critical governors' races coming up in 2020, and we have the historic opportunity to win in key swing states across the country. But with the GOP massively outspending us, Democrats will lose if we don't act RIGHT NOW. **Team, we need you to answer Obama 's call and donate to elect Democrats in 2020.******

We pulled your supporter record, and here 's what we found:**

name: Jason Yates
subject: Time is running out - double your impact by midnight!
body:
| | [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191231pm_apl01nd&n=1) Peter, I hope you read Mike Huckabee’s message earlier today. Now there are just hours left in 2019 before we ring in the new year, and we are so close to hitting our year-end fundraising goal! Will you make a year-end contribution to help us cross the finish line? Every dollar you give before 11:59 PM tonight will be doubled! But any amount of the matching grant that isn’t fully met today will be lost. Your donation will empower other Christ followers to bring the influence of their faith into the voting booth in 2020. Let’s face it, there are many who are apathetic or confused. You can help change that. **Your donation will:**
* **Raise up the next generation of Christian voters.**
* **Engage churches to reach their congregation to vote.**
* **Provide voting resources for all 100,000 elections in 2020.**
* **Inspire Christians to vote through a national media campaign.**
* **Leverage the latest technology to engage non-voters.**

You are part of this movement of millions of Christians who are making this happen and changing America’s course for the better. Together, we will dismantle the lies that sell socialism to our children. We will vote to have more judges appointed who stand courageously against the genocide of unborn children. And we will uphold a culture where the institution of the family is cherished, and God’s perfect and best design for marriage is protected. 2020 will be a monumental year for America - maybe more critical than 2016. While these elections will determine our course for the next few years, the consequences of these elections will be felt by the generations of our kids and grandkids. You have the opportunity to help us transform our nation as we mobilize 90-million Christians to unite in prayer and vote with biblical truth. [Please take advantage of this unique end-of-year opportunity to once again impact the 2020 elections for faith-driven outcomes](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191231pm_apl01nd&n=2). Remember, the deadline is tonight at midnight! Any amount of the matching grant that is not fully met will be lost. [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p191231apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191231pm_apl01nd&n=3) Thank you for standing boldly for biblical values. **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191231pm_apl01nd&n=4)
---

clean_body: This is a quick follow-up. Jason wrote you earlier today about our urgent end-of-year goal, and we’re close now. You can read more on this effort below. Fellow Conservative, This is a quick follow-up. Jason wrote you earlier today about our urgent end-of-year goal, and we’re close now. You can read more on this effort below. It’s imperative that you contribute $20.20 right now, to help us reach our goal and start the new year off with a strong showing! Jason’s running to take back Minnesota from the radical socialists, but he can’t do it alone. We need EVERY conservative on board to sustain our efforts. Help Jason expose Tina Smith’s true colors, and share his vision for a stronger America and a stronger Minnesota. . Tom Szymanski Campaign Manager, Jason Lewis for Senate | | From: Jason Lewis Sent: Tuesday, December 31, 2019 8:24 AM To: Tom Szymanski Subject: Just HOURS to go Tom, Yesterday, we kicked off an urgent 36-hour “Money Bomb” drive to close out 2019 strong. It’s vital that we post strong numbers – to show that Minnesota Republicans have my back in this race – and every contribution is going to be a huge help. So please, . Take a stand to help DEFEAT Tina Smith and her radical-left cronies on November 3, 2020! For Minnesota & America, Jason Lewis Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate |

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | Hello Friends, It’s New Years Eve and many of us are getting ready to celebrate the new year and the new decade, 2020! I am looking forward to a great 2020, ushering in a House controlled by Republicans and flipping Florida’s 13th district from blue back to red! I appreciate anything you can do before the close of the quarter tonight to help our campaign to continue gaining momentum. We know that where we are today us only because of you—one of the top candidates with the NRCC’s Young Guns program and as one of Rep. Stefanik’s top female candidates in the nation— that we CAN win this seat back and restore a House of Representatives that isn’t hell bent on relentlessly pursuing our President. But we want to make sure that we maintain our frontrunner status. If you can help before tonight you will allow us to continue to show that Charlie can be beat! Gratefully, Amanda Makki for Congress P.O.Box 47483 St. Petersburg, FL 33743 www.amandamakki.com 727-735-5921 | "Contribute Now" | | | | Copyright © 2019 Amanda Makki for Congress, All rights reserved.

Hi Friend, In 2019, I launched my campaign for Congress. With 2020 just a few hours away, I can't help but think how far we have come. Our HQ is buzzing with activity, we've hosted events across the district, received both national and local endorsements and our volunteers have been registering voters, phone banking and building our coalition. We are in it to win and our opponents have taken notice. We know that 2020 will be the fight of our lives. That's why we need your help \-- and why we're working around the clock right now to raise as many contributions as possible before the filing deadline of 9 PM Oregon time today. **[Can we count on you to chip in before our FEC end of year deadline?](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/AwE/ni0YAA/t.2y0/gnWrBuUKRlSGbXe4RsuEbA/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKPj9S5dRtR9nVdq7nW05v05-2Fi7D9J-2Fqhj-2F46hEBctJ7P-2FqeWsVA6iVYTz9NXF04yBMZQPVgEN-2Fkj3wTlX4eMmou7Ay8BJNVw7-2BMaYkAYqmndFBlP4X4L8lrapuSP-2Fy58UZ72-2BLFkYvR5iPL9zezWM3tqXXbD99h-2Fa36TV-2B6Upg8xzzvTgqxxWCnA0Ax6WT3IdpR9MFWlkOfZGZDEjpSVatBsJ12FWgGZeXLsLx88-2BXHAZgstSafZM5U4xhTM8ecl-2BnL7wYH4qn3L2f8u8vQoYU/5BAq)**

name: Team Hickenlooper
subject: The GOP is looking for our weakness
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
|
#
Folks -- [**If you 're looking to make a difference in the most consequential election cycle of our lifetimes, there is no better race to invest in than John Hickenlooper's campaign for U.S. Senate in Colorado. The latest poll of this race has us ahead. Donate now before tonight's deadline:**](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191231-this?refcode=em-191231-c&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") [](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191231-this?refcode=em-191231-c&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") In a few days, we'll close the books on our fundraising for the year. Once we do, our numbers will become public, and everyone will get to see how strong (or vulnerable) this campaign is. Right now, our race is a toss-up. John is leading in the polls, and Cory Gardner is ranked as the most vulnerable Republican Senator of 2020. **But if we report weak fundraising numbers, all of that could change.** Mitch McConnell and his buddies are looking for any sign of weakness in our organization. They're plotting and planning ways to pounce on our race, flood the airwaves with secret money, and tilt the balance in their favor. **Don 't let them.** [**Help us show the GOP just how strong this team is by chipping in $10 or more now. We 're facing our biggest FEC deadline yet, so if you're waiting for the right moment to give -- the time is now. Donate right here >>**](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191231-this?refcode=em-191231-c&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=") | [DONATE](https://secure.hickenlooper.%3D/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jwh-em-191231-this?refcode=em-191231-c&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
It's crucial we have enough resources to start this election year off strong. Your donation now could be the difference between making key investments in January or starting the critical first months of the new year playing catch up.
-- Team Hick

name: =?utf-8?Q?Will=20Douglas?=
subject: It's been an amazing year, but there's one thing left to do.
body:
Help us start 2020 strong. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/e725b7965a1a/im-running-for-texas-house-12122433?e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=2d6371259e&e=4f010155df)
---
| | [ ](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=280948ecb1&e=4f010155df)
---
| Peter,

It has been an incredible year. When I first started thinking about running for office I had no idea how I would be received.

That's why the overwhelming grassroots support for my candidacy to take back HD 113 has been so humbling. Thanks to you, we are going into 2020 with no primary opponent and will be able to focus all of our resources on beating Rhetta Bowers.

Texas Democrats' cannot be allowed to flip the Texas House in 2020. Their solutions mean more government control and less prosperity for Texas families. We can beat them, but we can't make the mistake of thinking it will be easy.

Last election cycle Rhetta Bowers was endorsed by none other than former President Barack Obama. He will likely be back in 2020, and fighting that kind of national name ID is going to take serious resources.

[**Will you donate just $20.20, for 2020, to help us post a strong fundraising total after our deadline tonight and show the Left we are ready to fight?**](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=7813bf1c5c&e=4f010155df)

I know it can be a tall ask to donate, [**but just a few dollars**](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=2714f1404f&e=4f010155df) can make the difference when it comes to reaching voters, boosting turnout, and getting our message out there.

I hope you had a fantastic Christmas and have a joyful New Year's Eve. [**In 2020 we're going to deliver for Texas families and keep this state prosperous and free.**](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=43deca4618&e=4f010155df)

Thank you, let's win together.

For Texas,
[](https://willdouglasfortexas.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f04ec3916ea34d520e31df9fc&id=d914e12052&e=4f010155df)
Will Douglas

name: Polyak, Erik
subject: Our last email this decade
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action
body:
| **I 'll be upfront, this is the last email you will receive from us this decade.**

314 was founded to help Democratic Scientists become elected across the country, and with everything going on in our country right now, we need science-minded Democrats in office.

**To get more Democratic scientists elected, we need $982 before midnight.**

[All we need is 5 people from your area to chip in $10 before midnight. Can I count on you?](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+All+we+need+is+5+people+from+ZIPyour+are&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191231_3_12&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191231_3_12&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191231_3_12") | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.
---
| [GIVE $10 INSTANTLY](https://secure.314action.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&express_lane=true&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+GIVE+10+INSTANTLY&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191231_3_12&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191231_3_12&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191231_3_12")
---
Republicans are raising money hand over fist and funneling that money into science-denying candidates across the United States. Our only way to counter them is through grassroots contributions.

This is the most critical FEC deadline of the year, and we can't afford to appear weak. EVERYONE will be able to see our numbers, so we need you to give right now.

**This is our most significant deadline of the year. From all of us at 314, please chip in before midnight.**

[https://secure.314action.org/matchthis](https://secure.314action.%3D%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-decfr?amount=10&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+httpssecure314actionorgmatchthis&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191231_3_12&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191231_3_12&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191231_3_12")

Thank you for everything this year,

Erik Polyak

Paid for by 314 Action Fund, 314action.org, not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---

**[Click here to unsubscribe from 314 Action's email list.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb433d/4bd7760e/467d06b7/77acdcef/3967572912/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI0NjdkMDZiNyIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI0MzNkIn0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/467d06b7/29bb433d?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Click+here+to++unsubscribe+from+314+Acti&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191231_3_12&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191231_3_12&refcode=314_EM_FR_30OP_191231_3_12")**

314 Action is a grassroots community of over 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb433d/4bd7760e/467d06b7/77acdcee/3967572912/VEsD/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_30OP_191231_3_12&source=314_EM_FR_30OP_191231_3_12")** to make a donation.

subject: Midnight
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
There are only a few hours left until my 2019 fundraising deadline and I need your help.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDE0NTA3MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2Mjc4OTk0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

_****_
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDE0NTA3MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2Mjc4OTk0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter -
There are only a few hours left until my 2019 fundraising deadline and I need your help.
Together, we can show Sara Gideon and her far Left allies how strong we are. We cannot allow Far Left special interest groups to decide Maine's election.
[**Please consider contributing $100, $50, $25, or even just $5 to my campaign before midnight tonight.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=NDE0NTA3MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2Mjc4OTk0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
This year has been incredible. From all the work I've gotten done in Washington to the official announcement of my 2020 campaign just weeks ago, I am proud to have you by my side.
Through everything, I am so thankful for all the support you have shown me. Thank you.
****
All my best,
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=NDE0NTA3MDIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTY2Mjc4OTk0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

body:

|

| | Peter -- quick update. I'm knee-deep in spreadsheets and as of 23 minutes ago, we're behind on hitting our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. This is a critical goal since it's the last chance we have to show the financial strength of this campaign before our primary.

We've only got a few hours to catch up, and we've got $3,788 to go. I have to check -- can you dig deep to pitch in before heading out to celebrate the New Year? Here's a link you can use so your contribution counts immediately toward our goal:
[**https://mjfortexas.com/NewYearsEve/MATCHED**](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890613/7f51f7bc/4acdf9f8/4ef03d57/2153266868/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjcwNCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-eoqmatch?refcode=email_20191231.3nd__704__&amount=10&recurring=true")

I'm hoping I can give MJ some good news before the ball drops! Thanks so much for everything.

Taylor Klos
TX Finance Director, MJ for Texas

name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Time is almost up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4f89212ca451/time-is-almost-up?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| | Hi

I’m emailing you a second time today because the **need to protect America is that great!**

Our midnight deadline is fast approaching and we need YOU to help keep Congressional District 22 RED.

The **anti-family, anti-God, anti-Constitution, anti-gun** Democrats want to un-do what YOUR vote did in 2016 – they want President Trump out of office. No matter the lies, no matter the cost, **no matter the damage.**

The impeachment debacle led by San Francisco socialist Nancy Pelosi, Shifty Schiff, and the other swamp creatures has been nothing short of a witch hunt. They want to destroy America – and they want to destroy Texas values.

President Trump is working around the clock to drain the swamp, and **I’m working tirelessly to get to Washington D.C. to help him in that fight.**

We need to make sure we have every resource at our disposal to defeat these liberal leftists from ruining our country.

As my campaign team and I knock on doors, make phone calls, and spend time with **YOU** the voter, I know in my gut we cannot win this fight **WITHOUT YOU**.

After midnight tonight, we will turn in our fundraising report to the Federal Election Commission.

Will you help send me to Washington D.C. to fight alongside President Trump against the do-nothing Democrats?

**Will you give a gift of...**
---
|
---
| [$15](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=a19650a54f&e=01c99b7fbd "$15")
---
| [$25](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=0aa88f51f3&e=01c99b7fbd "$25")

---
| [$100](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=6fd9cf933e&e=01c99b7fbd "$100")
---
| [or even $250](https://KathaleenWall.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6732b2a961d1a34b05e3194bb&id=8fa75c36ec&e=01c99b7fbd "or even $250")
---
| **...before time runs out?**
In liberty,
Kathaleen

| | It's time. Our year-end fundraising deadline is coming up in just a few hours, and we're just a few donations from hitting our incredible 50,000 grassroots donor goal. [**Will you chip in before the ball drops?**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2c0d0/6cd27893/536009d5/1587d3f1/569243403/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-jeff-merkley?refcode=2019-12-31-eoq&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") Tonight at midnight, I'll kiss my wife, hug my kids, and make a few resolutions for the new year. name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Our democracy needs Jamaal.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOWMAN FOR CONGRESS** ](www
body:
| | [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/CgE/ni0YAA/t.2y0/RM2wXKGtTiK61pMCHZ0NsQ/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLrnLz2lFxw1j6nghDtELKIdG9C7V9r7KUgk-2FAVim9RqtSfzdZfhV3iWcaYsNdYn-2FHt0hhivhG8q4klrHdffYmr4w9c83dzC7ipcZNj-2FV-2BQpJaeeizxxyRZrsqQMPxiKOn23HoPeptDT0B-2BJxP4ezzPWATKdTHiogLMQJXr-2BtBMevX-2Bi10HUKvEZ3u7pE-2FxDsN8cwOCrs97GVHDIlpRV5n1gOWYebBz3QTsoRAxxMRGhv7-2Bo-2BlaqPu-2BcygFT25y5alH6DtWvJQ1fttMSWtlB491TRjMMdfSmUQvisqY8RiK19vPrPq9G2ql2jzvK-2FtTafE-3D/_qJa)
---
Peter, I was proud to endorse Jamaal Bowman for Congress in November. Jamaal is running a grassroots, people-powered campaign so that the voice of the people of NY's 16th district has a place in Congress.
---
| [ ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/CgE/ni0YAA/t.2y0/RM2wXKGtTiK61pMCHZ0NsQ/h1/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLrnLz2lFxw1j6nghDtELKIdG9C7V9r7KUgk-2FAVim9RqiPwc-2FNrrx4Wfm-2F-2Bb51-2BOPIprcy-2Bb9axzKcjty-2B4BzyvHxtZbikykXWtqA94mgWzZzuLmSOJYNjKxzBb04oauTsPH47Dt03PxsbRTLiK8ycBMio-2F9xbf4wOne6nMALLwvhJv1x-2BLyp5Hv2D-2BFpgOksBWiKpQBWs1vzjM8GASrwlYDMSKCRbvCWL4RBBLye6KzcBYVO5Ax1nm5RsxpyANqMb6bYSF6dy9h4LmSX2nbvAVMA2JpfjOLUGtAk7YdeD-2BvHieWPWiAEWFPcDyMatxJ4s-3D/6OIJ)
---
From being a classroom teacher to becoming a principal and founding a public middle school in the Bronx, Jamaal has devoted his life to public education. **He has been a leader in the opt-out movement, speaking out against the weaponization of standardized testing.** He led community organizing efforts against the school-to-prison pipeline. **He has been outspoken about chronic underfunding of our public schools.** Public education is the infrastructure of democracy, and too many Democrats have been silent or complicit in the privatization of education and the high-stakes testing movement, ignoring the human impacts. Jamaal is resigning from his position as a middle school principal to fully commit to his campaign. Because he is putting it all on the line for this race, we need to have his back to help make sure he wins. Will you chip in right now to help Jamaal reach his goal of raising $8,500 before midnight tonight?
---
[ **DONATE NOW** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/CgE/ni0YAA/t.2y0/RM2wXKGtTiK61pMCHZ0NsQ/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNLrnLz2lFxw1j6nghDtELKIdG9C7V9r7KUgk-2FAVim9RquIix3i6-2Fk6Ok72jdpczynTCcHMFDFh6QqDS5lw5LD2hqmCGYor4nrKy1Wf-2BjIFk2uHAmtB87pdG5OoONxgoG4cKluuG2wU3KAMSJg56UVJ9Y7zpq2ehk6G-2BQOvUfx2pwHu9uypUyO1rOGEecI5qyYlrKIQpo7QJNTdcXft8mSLoMb13V-2BarcFUhddeaSWxyk2MOa2IXYaqWuCqFsyFUNMlaZsveyT5b2Jc0IA5OoZvGIPA-2FwTD-2F8UpuXafsUayYXB0mbYh-2FpvJdNsVIA-2BzHNLQ-3D/2eaK)
---
Jamaal has been campaigning while working full time as a principal of a school in a low-income district. Now that he can fully commit to campaigning, everything is going to kick into high gear as he fights for a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and free public college.
Jamaal's opponent -- Eliot Engel -- has a war chest of corporate PAC and lobbyist money to draw from. But Jamaal has a powerful coalition of working people like you on his side. We need a fierce, loving educator like Jamaal Bowman in Congress to put public education at the center of our politics. That's why it's so important that Jamaal reaches his end-of-year fundraising goal of $8,500.

clean_body: | | Peter, I was proud to endorse Jamaal Bowman for Congress in November. Jamaal is running a grassroots, people-powered campaign so that the voice of the people of NY's 16th district has a place in Congress. | From being a classroom teacher to becoming a principal and founding a public middle school in the Bronx, Jamaal has devoted his life to public education. He has been a leader in the opt-out movement, speaking out against the weaponization of standardized testing. He led community organizing efforts against the school-to-prison pipeline. He has been outspoken about chronic underfunding of our public schools. Public education is the infrastructure of democracy, and too many Democrats have been silent or complicit in the privatization of education and the high-stakes testing movement, ignoring the human impacts. Jamaal is resigning from his position as a middle school principal to fully commit to his campaign. Because he is putting it all on the line for this race, we need to have his back to help make sure he wins. Will you chip in right now to help Jamaal reach his goal of raising $8,500 before midnight tonight? Jamaal has been campaigning while working full time as a principal of a school in a low-income district. Now that he can fully commit to campaigning, everything is going to kick into high gear as he fights for a Green New Deal, Medicare for All, and free public college. Jamaal's opponent -- Eliot Engel -- has a war chest of corporate PAC and lobbyist money to draw from. But Jamaal has a powerful coalition of working people like you on his side. We need a fierce, loving educator like Jamaal Bowman in Congress to put public education at the center of our politics. That's why it's so important that Jamaal reaches his end-of-year fundraising goal of $8,500. Make your best gift today to help Jamaal raise $8,500 before he runs out of time. Onward, Zephyr Teachout | www.BowmanForCongress.com?linkid=11&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-our-democracy-needs-jamaal-4&emailreferrer=email691987&emailsubject=our-democracy-needs-jamaal Bowman for Congress 81 Pondfield Rd, Suite D 351 Bronxville, NY 10708 | | Sent Via . name: Dick Durbin
subject: My last email of the year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
First, I want to thank all of you for the support and friendship you've given me over the last year. I am proud to have all of you behind me as I fight for our families and values in the Senate.
Despite President Trump's reckless actions and Mitch McConnell's obstruction in the Senate, we've stood together and fought back on so many important issues, like protecting health care for millions with pre-existing conditions, defending our Dreamers, and fighting climate change.
Next year, our fights will go into overdrive as Democrats do everything in our power to take back the White House and the Senate. But we can't win these battles without your continued support.
**[We only have a couple hours left until the FEC's midnight deadline. Will you stand with me one more time in 2019 and pitch in $5 toward my end-of-year fundraising goal?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eoq-dec-2019?refcode=em191231pm-i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you for your support. Happy New Year!
Dick Durbin
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-eoq-dec-2019?refcode=em191231pm-i&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4eb6/42ab3cf4/601837e1/135d5611/539030476/VEsC/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

name: Rosario Dawson
subject: Hi again!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| I'm hoping I can ask for your help with this. Hey there! Before we ring in the new year tonight, I wanted to write a note to you. I've been with Cory on the campaign trail recently, and it's been an incredible experience. I've watched as rooms in Iowa filled to the brim with supporters, spent the Fourth of July with him and Nevada caucus-goers, and cheered Cory on at the debate in Atlanta. **I know Cory 's supporters are special, and I know it means the world to Cory that you're on this team.** So from the bottom of my heart, thank you for being in his corner. I'm so grateful that people like you across the country believe in Cory as I do. Which is why I'm hoping I can ask for your help. Cory told me that he has a big fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and I really want to help him reach it. [**Can I ask for your help? Donate whatever you can before the clock strikes midnight tonight.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191231_RD_20191231-fr-RD-EM3-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") Thanks so much for helping him do this, and for being the best team out there. Happy New Year!

Rosario [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-december?refcode=em_fr_20191231_RD_20191231-fr-RD-EM3-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f6b/5fca0d19/7b1ae7ba/291cc43b/3038146969/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f6b/5fca0d19/7b1ae7ba/291cc43a/3038146969/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f6b/5fca0d19/7b1ae7ba/291cc439/3038146969/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f6b/5fca0d19/7b1ae7ba/291cc438/3038146969/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0f6b/5fca0d19/7b1ae7ba/291cc43c/3038146969/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").
clean_body: | | | | I'm hoping I can ask for your help with this. Hey there! Before we ring in the new year tonight, I wanted to write a note to you. I've been with Cory on the campaign trail recently, and it's been an incredible experience. I've watched as rooms in Iowa filled to the brim with supporters, spent the Fourth of July with him and Nevada caucus-goers, and cheered Cory on at the debate in Atlanta. I know Cory 's supporters are special, and I know it means the world to Cory that you're on this team. So from the bottom of my heart, thank you for being in his corner. I'm so grateful that people like you across the country believe in Cory as I do. Which is why I'm hoping I can ask for your help. Cory told me that he has a big fundraising deadline at midnight tonight, and I really want to help him reach it. "=" Thanks so much for helping him do this, and for being the best team out there. name: EdMarkey.com
subject: Just a few hours left
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
Our FEC deadline is just a few hours away. | |
---
| Friends -

Our FEC deadline is just a few hours away. Shortly after that, we'll have to make our numbers public for the media and pundits to pick apart.

So before midnight, we're trying to generate as many donations as possible to make sure we can hit our goal and have a strong showing of grassroots support.

Ed understands how important it is to run a grassroots campaign, and he wants to be sure that everyone sees how powerful our movement is.

After we close the books, we're going to send Ed a list of everyone who chipped in toward our goal. We want to make sure your name is on that list. Can we add your name?

**[Make a $3 donation toward before the FEC deadline, we'll make sure Ed knows you're with him in this fight. Every dollar will go directly to helping us reach out to voters in every ZIP code of Massachusetts. ](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dff9/693b8b0a/437cf669/72de7392/379516815/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEyMzEtMi1mdWxsIn0%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-december?refcode=em191231-2-full")**

This won't be easy. We'll need you with us to make sure we have what it takes to win.

Please help us start 2020 in a strong position. It's now or never.

Together in this fight,

\- Team Markey

name: Gary
subject: before the year is up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN Peters for Michigan
body:
We're just hours away from the biggest fundraising deadline of our campaign to date
| | |
---
We're just hours away from the biggest fundraising deadline of our campaign to date, friends, and I need your help.

CBS News reports that our chances to flip the Senate hinge on what happens here in Michigan. But right now, things are not looking good:

National Republicans have started pouring millions into Michigan to attack me - and recent polling shows me statistically tied with my opponent, hand-picked by Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell.
**The only way we can win in Michigan and take back the Senate for Democrats is if we raise another $7,521 before our last FEC deadline of 2019 at midnight.nbsp;** But my team says we're just $3,100 short - and time's running out.

**Friends, what we do now will decide who controls the Senate and the future of the Supreme Court:** **[Please, will you rush $5 or more right now to win in Michigan so we can take back the Senate for Democrats and protect the future of the Supreme Court?](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6da92a/5721a3ed/70736146/efb422b/1635476931/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoicGV0ZXJzX2VtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGsxNjAtZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCIsImUzc2dZV0p5WldOMWNuSnBibWNnZlgwPSI6IiZyZWN1cnJpbmc9MSJ9/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/peters_email?refcode=jtk160-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&recurring=1")**

Thank you for coming through when we need it most.

Gary

Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244 Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth, and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. name: =?utf-8?Q?Ian=20Todd?=
subject: Moving forward into 2020
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/18bcec3043d4/moving-forward-into-2020?e=c56804a14d)
---
|
---
|
# No worries, no 20/20 puns here.
This time of year is all about reflection. We are happy to begin a new decade with so much promise but are thankful for all the memories of the decade to pass. We deeply appreciate and are ever grateful to all of you who have and continue to support our campaign. May 2020 bring us closer to our goal of flipping not only our Congressional seat but seats up and down the ballot all over the country.

---
| [Donate!](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=1ba2d23a35&e=c56804a14d "Donate!")
---
|
---
| |
---
| | We have quite the uphill battle, but we believe in the power of our supporters. We would like to thank and recognize everyone who has sent in their personal endorsements so far. If you haven't yet, what are you waiting for? Below are some of what we have received.

"Ian came close to winning the last election. His perseverance and willingness to run again will serve him well in winning the next election." \- K. Kubal

"He will support the people of our district, not play partisan politics." \- B. Palmer

"Too long we have been sending the wrong type of people to represent us. I believe that Ian, while Democrat, will put country over party and do the right thing when necessary. I believe Ian understands that our Democracy is still a fragile work in progress, and needs people who understand and respect what our Founding Fathers started." \- B. Lundeen

"Ian Todd supports policies that will help ordinary people, not big corporations and the rich. We have met him, spoken to him, and find him to be a truthful, honorable candidate."
\- B. and T. Folsom

Thank you for all your support and see you in 2020!

---
|
---
| [Donate!](https://IanToddforcongress.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0824156d3c3076099692cab73&id=11e4005f58&e=c56804a14d "Donate!")

---

Ian Todd for Congress1974 Peach Dr NESauk Rapids, MN 56379-4579

name: Team Stephanie
subject: We asked a lot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
And we need to ask one last time. Can you chip in to help us hit our goal before midnight tonight?
|
---

| | Team , Before midnight we wanted to let you know how grateful we are for your support over the last five days. We asked a lot from you and the response has been overwhelming. We are a few hours away from our fundraising deadline and we are still $155 away from hitting our end-of-year goal. That means we only need four of our amazing donors to chip in $39 before midnight. Here is the link Kim sent over: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/BeforeMidnight](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0e6/522d4087/7aff5fd3/4f3413f4/2622313223/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?refcode=20191231_em_fr_nd_eoq6_l1") We appreciate everything you have done so far to help flip this seat. Our campaign will be a success because of you. \-- Team Stephanie | **[CONTRIBUTE NOW](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0e6/522d4087/7aff5fd3/4f3413f3/2622313223/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/39years?amount=39&refcode=20191231_em_fr_nd_eoq6")**
---

|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
---
_New Jersey native Stephanie Schmid is running for New Jersey 's 4th Congressional District. Stephanie has a strong record of serving her community, protecting those most vulnerable, and solving difficult public policy problems. She's running to bring new leadership to Congress at a time when we need our leaders to solve pressing challenges and create opportunities for the people of New Jersey._ _Stephanie is running a grassroots campaign rooted in New Jersey values. She's not accepting any corporate PAC donations or money from special interests.[**Can you chip in $5 now to Stephanie's campaign?**](secure.actblue.com/donate/stephanienj-november?refcode=em_footer&amounts=5,10,15,20,25,30,35&amount=5)_

Stephanie for New Jersey

Little Silver, NJ 07739

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bobby=20Schilling?=
subject: Just a few hours left.
body:
Will you help us win in 2020? |
---
| | Peter, [**This is it. Our biggest fundraising deadline yet is in just a few hours.**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=3710e2ac00&e=90fad69796)

I decided to run for Congress because I believe in the Trump agenda. Radical obstructionist Democrats have prevented President Trump from passing his America-First agenda.

We need to flip the House in 2020, and swing districts like IA-02 are the key to doing that. This district voted for President Trump by 5 points in 2016. It'll vote for him again in 2020.

But the only way the people of this district will vote for a Republican for Congress is if they know they are electing a fighter who will work for them--not special interests.

That's me. I am ready and willing to fight. But we need your help to build the resources to get our message to voters.

Tonight's deadline is incredibly important. [**Will you donate just $5, $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500 to help us win this primary and beat the left in 2020?**](https://bobbyforiowa.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=f57658eeef5e9b1f9d6e8ab7e&id=ba2f8d8bcf&e=90fad69796)

Together we can help President Trump pass his America-First agenda and deliver for Iowans.

For Iowa,

Bobby Schilling

---
| |
---
| [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bobbyforiowa.com/this-impeachment-drama-is-hurting-america-1523941?e=90fad69796)

body:
| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=5391%2E377263%2EViLG7g) Yang Gang --

We still haven’t qualified for the January DNC debate. To help us do that -- we need to hit our stretch goal of $3.5 million and **there are less than 6 hours left.[Can you rush a contribution right now?](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21053?t=5&akid=5391%2E377263%2EViLG7g)**

Qualifying for the debates is critical to our path to victory. We need every second of time in front of a national audience of Democrats if we’re going to win and take on the establishment candidates with higher name recognition.

[**We have a plan that will help us qualify for the debate -- but we have to raise $209,784 more in less than 6 hours (our FEC deadline) to fully execute it.**](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21053?t=7&akid=5391%2E377263%2EViLG7g) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://act.yang2020.com/go/21053?t=8&express_lane=true&amount=10&akid=5391%2E377263%2EViLG7g)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Janet=20Barresi?=
subject: Fwd: 5 donors and we hit our goal.
body:
We just need 5 more donors to hit our goal, will you help? |
---
| | Peter,

Before you settle in with your family for New Year's Eve I wanted to update you on our fundraising efforts before the deadline tonight. The email my team sent you this morning said we needed 23 donors and several of you stepped up to help us.

[**We need just 5 more donors to hit our goal. Will you please join our campaign by donating just a few dollars?**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=88ffa476bd&e=795c6d9796)

In 2020 we will win this primary, flip the district red again, and defend conservative Oklahoma values in Washington. We just need your help to do it.

Thank you for supporting our campaign this year.

For Oklahoma,

Janet Barresi
---
|
---
| [ ](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=797b3dc32b&e=795c6d9796)
---
| | Friend, Team Janet here. We wanted to give you an update on our fundraising numbers just a little over 12 hours before the end of the quarter.

[**We need to get 23 more donations by midnight tonight to hit our goals**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=5db9686117&e=795c6d9796) and have a strong showing for this critical fundraising report. [**Donate $5 >>>>
Donate $25 >>>>
Donate $50 >>>>
Donate $100 >>>>
Donate $250 >>>>
Donate $500 >>>>**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=5358d446db&e=795c6d9796)
[**Any amount is helpful. $5, $25, $50, $100, $250, or even $500 would go a long way in helping power our campaign to flip this district red again and give President Trump the conservative House he needs.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=f0b6dfdf63&e=795c6d9796)

Janet has worked hard the past few months to learn what matters to the citizens of Oklahoma's 5th district and earn their vote. Now she needs your help to make sure she finishes strong by the deadline tonight.

[**Please consider donating just a few dollars by midnight tonight so we can win the primary, beat Kendra Horn, and defend conservative Oklahoma values in Washington.**](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=5a97180f12&e=795c6d9796) For Freedom, Team Janet
---
| [QUICK DONATE](https://janet2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a78cce64304e05c22b2864ace&id=053a40e0af&e=795c6d9796 "QUICK DONATE")
---

---

Janet for CongressPO Box 20147Oklahoma City, OK 73156-0147
